programme.title: The Office: The Chump
programme.desc: Michael is surprisingly cheerful after learning some bad news about Donna. New parents, Pam and Jim, have trouble staying awake at work.

programme.title: The Office: Whistleblower

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: September 21, 2020

programme.title: The Office: Nepotism

programme.title: South Park: Grounded Vindaloop

programme.title: The Closer: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: An overweight owner of a jewelry store turns up dead in the trunk of a car.

programme.title: The Closer: Power of Attorney

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Stiffed
programme.desc: A mortician's body is discovered in one of his own funeral home's caskets, leading the team into the world of embalming, interment and ultimately serial murder. Tommy visits with his son TJ and considers returning to Boston for good.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Yesterday, Today, Tomorrow
programme.desc: Jane and Maura work to solve two murders, one from the past and one present day, which have deep personal connections for Korsak. Jane gets a surprise visit that might lead to romance, and Maura gets upsetting feedback on her novel.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Ocean Frank
programme.desc: The facts don't add up when a dead man is found handcuffed to a bed in his own home. As the bon voyage party approaches, everyone makes a video to say goodbye. Everyone says farewell and plans for their next adventure.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: See One, Do One, Teach One
programme.desc: Detective Rizzoli and medical examiner Isles investigate the grisly murder of a wealthy couple. The M.O. matches the work of a serial killer known as the Surgeon. Now that the Surgeon is behind bars, it seems a protégé is picking up where he left off.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Who Killed Chandra Levy?
programme.desc: Intern Chandra Levy vanishes in May of 2001 in Washington, D.C. Her cell phone and keys are found by police in her apartment that shows no signs of trouble, leading them to question where she went and who saw her last.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Caught on Tape

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Killer Cop
programme.desc: Rookie police officer James Duckett is sentenced to death for the rape and murder of a young girl. Fourteen years later, a homicide detective gets a letter from Duckett and becomes convinced of his innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Love Kills
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Stacey Stites' body is found half-naked by the side of the road, her fiancé, police officer Jimmy Fennell, is cleared as a suspect.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Memory of Murder
programme.desc: A small-time Ohio drug dealer sits on death row for murdering a family, until a rookie attorney unearths long-hidden case records that shed new light on the case.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Snitch Work
programme.desc: A 4-year-old girl is found murdered, her body placed in a TV box. Years later, a neighbour is arrested for the crime. When an author seeking to write about the death penalty comes across the case, he finds an investigation filled with holes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Dominate the Night
programme.desc: Teams from Street Outlaws: Fastest in America return to talk what it takes to win with discussions about team NOLA's Round 2 battle against Detroit.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Heads High in Sin City
programme.desc: Fastest in America racing teams come together to talk about what they learned from Memphis and NOLA's first matchup outside of Las Vegas.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Only the Fastest Survive
programme.desc: New and returning racing teams talk about what lessons they learned from MSO's Round 2 battle with team NOLA.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Black Sheep vs. Virginia
programme.desc: The Fastest in America season kicks off with a Wildcard matchup as Black Sheep Mafia sets out to prove they can hold their own against Team Virginia. Later, racers stick around to organize a night of high-stakes grudge racing.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Race Night in America: The Usual Suspects
programme.desc: It's single-elimination night on the streets including a 16-car street racing tournament in Texas worth $4,000. Local racers in Pennsylvania show off their skills on a city street while Arizona racers put out a fire and get a visit from Mother Nature.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Black Sheep vs. Virginia
programme.desc: The Fastest in America season kicks off with a Wildcard matchup as Black Sheep Mafia sets out to prove they can hold their own against Team Virginia. Later, racers stick around to organize a night of high-stakes grudge racing.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Race Night in America: The Usual Suspects
programme.desc: It's single-elimination night on the streets including a 16-car street racing tournament in Texas worth $4,000. Local racers in Pennsylvania show off their skills on a city street while Arizona racers put out a fire and get a visit from Mother Nature.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Go Down Fighting
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman hits rock bottom when, after seven seasons, a key crew member quits. Tony Beets transforms some rusty relics into a monster power barge, and a troubled Parker Schnabel misses his own birthday party.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Game Over
programme.desc: With no paycheck for five weeks, members of Todd Hoffman's close-knit team turn on each other. Parker's gamble to run his washplant without protection from rocks proves costly. Tony builds a mega-trailer to move his barge, but gets his measurements wrong.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Abandonment
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman's crew has quit, and he desperately tries to keep mining with a skeleton team. Parker Schnabel carelessly breaks his truck's air hoses while transporting his washplant, and Tony Beets discovers his dredge is blowing gold out of the sluices.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Lifeline
programme.desc: The remnants of the Hoffman crew are at their lowest, but someone brings Todd good news. Tony Beets fires his barge captain, then runs aground up the mighty Yukon River. Rick Ness finally gets Parker Schnabel's second operation up and running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker vs. Rick
programme.desc: Rick outperforms Parker on his new Indian River claim. Tony's dredge suffers a catastrophic failure, threatening his season. Todd Hoffman's skeleton crew finally sees good gold at their new mine in Colorado.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Excavator Down
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman eats humble pie when he begs his old crew to return. Parker Schnabel loses an excavator in a swamp and Tony Beets gives his daughter Monica her own operation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Double Trouble
programme.desc: The Hoffman crew opens a second mine in Colorado and Parker Schnabel tries out a new mechanic who fails to get approval from Mitch. Tony Beets sets sail in a power-barge up the mighty Yukon River.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Cruelest Cut
programme.desc: Parker Schnabel is forced to call his dad in to help his struggling operation, Todd Hoffman has the best clean-up of the season and Tony Beets' daughter Monica starts bringing home the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miners vs. Beavers
programme.desc: Todd's whole operation is brought to a halt when a beaver dams his water supply, Parker's plant move turns into an excavator nightmare, and a massive fix means Tony can finally get his broken dredge up and running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dredge vs. Washplant
programme.desc: Todd finds monster nuggets on the top of a mountain, Parker and Rick struggle with a conveyor, and Tony pits Monica against Kevin to see if the dredge is more efficient than a modern washplant.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Viking Voyage
programme.desc: Todd uses dynamite to blast monster boulders and get to the gold, Parker has to overcome a flood to get to a record gold count, and Tony heads up the freezing Yukon River in his massive power barge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Final Fury
programme.desc: As each crew attempts to hit their final goals, a fist fight on the Hoffman claim ends in a resignation. Tony's plan to relocate his dredge hits a brick wall and Parker records the biggest gold weigh of his life and teases his next big adventure.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 1
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Missouri homestead with a hungry bear, disease-carrying ticks, no food, and no power.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: The Consequences of Truth
programme.desc: Ari struggles with the news about her pregnancy. Deavan and Jihoon make a big move. Yazan starts to question his relationship with Brittany. Melyza reveals her secret to Tim. Armando's family reacts to his engagement to Kenny.

programme.title: The Family Chantel: Like Sister, Like Brother
programme.desc: Chantel's older brother returns to Atlanta with his foreign bride. The family welcomes her with open arms, but their speedy marriage sparks Chantel's suspicion. She takes her sister-in-law out to learn more. In the Dominican Republic, Nicole is in love.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: HEA Strikes Back!: Seeds of Discontent
programme.desc: Elizabeth's family confronts her about Andrei's actions. Jess extends an exotic invite to Colt. Skyla impedes Angela's wedding. Larissa finds out shocking news about Colt. Kalani and Asuelu's upcoming trip is threatened.

programme.title: The Family Chantel: A New Family Feud
programme.desc: Chantel's suspicions about Royal's relationship with Angenette grow after talking to Winter and River. As Pedro plans a trip to NYC, Chantel gets big news about her graduation. Sibling secrets come out when tempers flare during a holiday photo shoot.

programme.desc: Chantel's suspicions about Royal's relationship with Angenette grow after talking to Winter and River. As Pedro plans a trip to NYC, Chantel gets big news about her graduation. Sibling secrets come out when tempers flare during a holiday photo shoot.

programme.desc: Barry and Kim leave the farm for a night to celebrate their anniversary, putting Micah and Lydia in charge. They just have one rule: Ethan and Olivia aren't allowed to visit the farm while they're away. The Plath kids party and some uninvited guests join.

programme.desc: After the request for Isaac to join the band is denied by Barry and Kim, the family divide grows. Kim and Barry try to do damage control by extending a large and surprising olive branch to Ethan and Olivia. Moriah shares her desire for college.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: The Other Side of the Farm
programme.desc: Matt and Amy spar over the future of the farm after Amy proposes a bold new path forward. As Zach and Tori struggle to sell their house, Jackson tries to take his first steps. Matt deals with a potentially life-threatening situation with Lucy.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Two Houses, Two Mortgages

programme.desc: Kardea is meeting her brother, Kedrick, at his favourite fishing hole to hopefully catch their dinner.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Big Game Bites
programme.desc: Kardea is having her football-loving family over to watch the big game, and they all love to eat! Kardea is going deep into her delicious playbook to make fried chicken wings with a variety of dipping sauces, southern deviled eggs and chips 'n' crab dip.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Shrimp Fest
programme.desc: Its Kardea Brown's favourite time of the year: shrimp season in Charleston. This year she's making fried shrimp baskets and her mom helps out with hand cut fires and a grilled shrimp cobb salad. For dessert there's strawberry lemon bars.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Backyard Grill
programme.desc: Kardea fires up the grill for an old-fashioned backyard barbecue and invites her family over to enjoy some of her charbroiled dishes. She makes pimento cheese-stuffed burgers and grilled sea island wings, plus southern pickles and okra on the side.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Country Cookin'
programme.desc: From a smoky bacon breakfast bowl to super-saucy barbecued ribs, these Southern-inspired spots are crushing country cooking across the US.

programme.title: Food Paradise: All in the Family
programme.desc: The most indulgent meals at some of the best family-owned restaurants across the country are highlighted, from mole-smothered enchiladas in Los Angeles to cheesesteak-stuffed stromboli in Philadelphia.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Farm To Feast
programme.desc: From the world's most luxurious steaks to the season's most vibrant veggies, diners across the country are going wild for homegrown goodness at these popular farm-to-table restaurants.

programme.title: Chopped: Meat Your Match

programme.title: Chopped: Bar Fight
programme.desc: Four bartenders who love to cook compete in this special competition to prove that barkeeps know how to keep the flavors coming. An outrageous cocktail is the centerpiece of a fun first basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Chopped Champs Throwdown: Battle 1
programme.desc: In pursuit of $50,000, four Chopped champions are back at the stoves with renewed ambition, seeking to be named the best of the best! The appetizer round is as exciting as they come, and a fire extinguisher is used for the first time.

programme.title: Chopped: Chopped Champs Throwdown: Battle 2
programme.desc: Four Chopped champions come back fiercer than ever with their sights set on the tournament's $50,000 grand finale. The chefs create wildly different appetizers from a basket that includes black garlic.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Flood, Sweat, and Tears: Part Two

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Miska's Big Reveal
programme.desc: Vet Leanne races to rescue critically injured koalas from Australia's blazing bushfires. A two-tonne rhino calf named Kipenzi wreaks havoc in the zoo trucks, and the carnivore team eagerly awaits to see if snow leopard Miska reveals an exciting secret.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: Steve Irwin's family carry on his legacy as they run the Australian Zoo. Caring for over 1,200 animals, overseeing a world-class wildlife hospital, and conducting global conservation expeditions, their lives are full of adventure.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: New Day for an Old Tortoise

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Panda-monium
programme.desc: The Zoo says goodbye to beloved pandas Bai-Yun and Xiao Liwu as mother and cub prepare to return to China. Tembo the retired 'Hollywood' elephant tries traditional Chinese medicine for her arthritis. The Butterfly Jungle gets colored for the season.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mek Comes Home
programme.desc: After six years away, Mek the tiger returns to the Zoo. Two shy tree kangaroos, Spike and Polly, meet for the first time. And, with the Children's Zoo under construction, the keepers have to move over 100 animals, including a herd of reluctant goats.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Penguin Chick Swim School

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mkhaya Discovers Her Trunk
programme.desc: Mkhaya, the youngest baby elephant in the Safari Park herd, learns to use her trunk. Will Alba the Andean bear become a first-time mom? Zoo vets examine Mandazzi the gorilla, and Jeff the snake chaser looks for he elusive costal patch nose snake.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Miracle Calf

programme.desc: As Chandler’s decision making frustrates the deck crew, Rhylee and Ashton grow desperate for a change at bosun. The charter guests overcome their fears by swimming with some scary ocean predators.

programme.title: Below Deck: New Kids on the Dock
programme.desc: The crew welcomes aboard their largest group of charter guests yet, including two young children, posing new challenges for everyone. While Chef Adrian jumps through hoops to please all their preferences, Chandler tries to redeem himself.

programme.title: Below Deck: Flesh Wounds are not Five Star
programme.desc: Chandler is left at odds with Captain Lee and the entire Deck Team when an oversight leaves the charter guests stranded at an off-boat excursion without basic amenities.

programme.desc: Bravo's most opinionated women discuss the biggest headlines in pop culture.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Stuck in the Mud With You

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Who's the Boss?
programme.desc: Another charter season in the Mediterranean gets under way as the crew of the luxury yacht Sirocco sets sail in the waters off the spectacular coast of Croatia. Returning crew Hannah and Bobby are joined by seven new shipmates this time around.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Three's Company
programme.desc: Hannah continues to struggle with working under the close eye of Captain Sandy. After a mishap with the anchor, Sandy realizes her new deck crew has a lot to learn if they are going to have a successful charter season. Bobby develops a crush on Malia.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Chefs, Lies and FaceTime
programme.desc: The rift between Bobby and Hannah grows even wider when Lauren is dragged into a heated debate about the past. A frustrated Bobby calls out Lauren for having an affair with one of his close friends, leaving an emotional Lauren to feel ostracized.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: All Chained Up and No Place to Go
programme.desc: The naked guests distract the crew as they try to stay focused on their jobs. As Hannah and Bobby hash out their differences, Lauren struggles as the tension mounts between her and Bobby. Meanwhile, Bugsby deals with the loss of her grandmother.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Capt. Sandy gets frustrated when the deck crew makes a dangerous mistake. Also, tension mounts between Adam and Hannah, Bobby springs into action when a guest suffers an accident and a wild night out sparks romance, resulting in a love triangle.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry Over Cut Onions
programme.desc: Malia, Wes and Adam find themselves in uncharted emotional territory as news of their love triangle spreads below deck. The Oklahomans return as charter guests keeping the interior on their toes as they struggle to keep up with their demanding requests.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Mo' Onions, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Malia and Adam share a romantic moment, but complications arise when she continues to flirt with Wes. The charter guests play dirty as they challenge the Sirocco crew to a relay race. Hannah and Adam butt heads again.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Flirting With Danger
programme.desc: When a hot bachelor charters the Sirocco, a smitten Hannah attempts to keep it professional. Wes struggles with his growing feelings for Malia as fireworks ignite between her and Adam. Bugsy and Hannah's relationship gets further strained.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: iCloudy With a Chance of Secrets

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Kissing Up

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: The Dubrovnik Wedgie

programme.desc: Gibbs and his team board an aircraft carrier to investigate a sailor's drug overdose.

programme.title: NCIS: Beastmaster
programme.desc: After a marine sergeant is found murdered in a National Park, Gibbs and the team partner with Mounted Police Sergeant May Dawson to solve a string of related crimes in the park.

programme.title: NCIS: Something Blue
programme.desc: The stress of McGee and Delilah's imminent wedding takes its toll, as Delilah is rushed to the hospital. Also, the team travels out to sea after a young and healthy petty officer aboard a navy destroyer dies in his sleep.

programme.title: NCIS: Yankee White
programme.desc: Gibbs, Di Nozzo and Dr. 'Ducky' Mallard arrive on Air Force One to investigate a death.

programme.title: NCIS: Hung Out to Dry
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a Marine whose parachute failed to open.

programme.title: NCIS: Sea Dog
programme.desc: When a Navy commander's body washes up on shore along with the bodies of two drug runners, Gibbs refuses to believe that the sailor who was killed was dirty.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Deliverance
programme.desc: Hetty and the NCIS team continue to search for an elusive book that has the attention of several foreign security agencies.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Disorder
programme.desc: Kensi connects personally with a discharged navy intelligence officer suffering from posttraumatic stress disorder, and who is the sole survivor of a deadly dispute being investigated by the NCIS team.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Overwatch
programme.desc: The team uncovers an experimental Navy tracking system, when a body containing a top-secret residue is stolen from an autopsy room.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Cherry Red
programme.desc: The detectives try to unravel a deadly mystery after an elderly woman dies in a fire.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Blink
programme.desc: Detectives Goren and Eames must add-up the clues when a college math student is murdered.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Graansha
programme.desc: A female probation officer's slaying leads detectives to a crooked clan of Irish gypsies.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Assignment of the Year
programme.desc: While Antonio continues his off-duty security job for Asher and Layla, Asher is killed. Voight works the case while making sure Antonio is covered and Halstead and Lindsay go undercover in a rather uncomfortable location.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Called in Dead
programme.desc: A friend of Nadia's leads the intelligence unit to a huge heroin bust. Unfortunately, this bust results in Olinksy arriving home to find his wife being held hostage.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Shouldn't Have Been Alone
programme.desc: With Burgess in the hospital after suffering gunshot wounds, the intelligence team is determined to find the people responsible. Lindsay delays her start so she can help with the case and the team takes turns watching over Burgess.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: We Don't Work Together Anymore
programme.desc: Lindsay has her first case with the task force and realizes she needs to call on Voight and her Intelligence Unit to assist. Meanwhile, Burgess is back at work and delegated to desk duty, allowing Platt to partner up with Roman.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Disco Bob
programme.desc: Bob Ruzek is the first to arrive at the scene of a double murder. Intelligence arrives to take over the investigation and tensions rise when Bob must hand over the case to his son and Voight. Lindsay heads off to Bolivia for a case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Devil Complex
programme.desc: Antonio and his sister Gabriela go to the office of Elliot Gish, the man they believe started the fire that killed Shay. Intelligence puts pressure on Gish to confess. Lindsay approaches Voight about returning to Intelligence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Erin's Mom
programme.desc: Bunny comes to Lindsay concerned about a suspicious repeat customer at her husband's rental company. This lead brings info into a case which robbery-homicide has been working for months. Voight doesn't trust Bunny's motive for the tip.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Do You Do?
programme.desc: Burgess and Roman tackle a dangerous smuggling operation with no means to defend themselves or call for help. Meanwhile, it's a slow day in intelligence and they are spending the day receiving taser certification.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Puts You on That Ledge
programme.desc: Commander Fischer updates Voight on a missing officer that Narcotics had deep undercover with a robbery crew. Burgess and Roman deal with a squatter.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Say Her Real Name
programme.desc: With a World Trade conference in Chicago, all members of intelligence are undercover in various protest groups to determine potential threats.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Get Back to Even
programme.desc: Intelligence responds to a drug robbery gone wrong and in their investigation it is revealed that the first person Voight ever gave his card to is linked to a double murder. Halstead discovers the real reason his brother came to Chicago.

programme.title: Movie: Slender Man
programme.desc: A figure ripped out of nightmares terrifies a small town after a girl goes missing. Called the Slender Man, it appears as a tall and thin figure with grotesquely long arms and a face without features that prays on youth and turns them against each other.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Genius
programme.desc: Bart swaps IQ tests with a smart classmate and ends up in a school for gifted kids.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Odyssey
programme.desc: Homer becomes a safety activist when he loses his job for causing an accident at the nuclear plant.

programme.title: The Simpsons: There's No Disgrace Like Home
programme.desc: After seeing how dysfunctional his family is at a company picnic, Homer enrols them all in therapy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the General
programme.desc: The school bully has been terrorizing the students, especially Bart, who has been singled out for standing up for Lisa. When Bart is beaten up after school, he and his friends form a plan to get back at Nelson.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moaning Lisa
programme.desc: Lisa is depressed about her problems, but perks up when she meets jazz musician Bleedin' Gums Murphy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Call of the Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer buys a beat-up motor home to take the family on a camping trip. But they quickly run into trouble when Homer gets lost and is mistaken for Big Foot.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Tell-Tale Head
programme.desc: To impress bad kids from school, Bart cuts off the head of Jebediah Springfield's statue.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Life on the Fast Lane
programme.desc: Marge vows to learn how to bowl when Homer gives her a bowling ball for her birthday. However, she is tempted to have an affair with her charming bowling instructor.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Night Out
programme.desc: Using his new mail-order spy camera, Bart catches Homer dancing on stage with a stripper at a stag party.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Crepes of Wrath
programme.desc: Bart is sent to France for a student-exchange program, where is hosts are a family of winemakers who plan to use him as a slave. The student that stays with the Simpsons is a spy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Some Enchanted Evening
programme.desc: Marge and Homer go out for a night on the town, unknowingly leaving the children with a babysitter featured on America's Most Armed and Dangerous.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Gets an 'F'

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Sells Out

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac Is a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Once the gang reads that a serial killer is on the loose, Mac's actions seem very suspect. They decide to follow him and find out the truth.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Dennis Looks Like a Registered Sex Offender
programme.desc: Dennis is insulted when he is mistaken for a sex offender, because the real culprit is overweight.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: How to Raise the Perfect Dog

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: The Hairy Houdini
programme.desc: Cesar Millan blends his brand of canine communication with tough love to curb problems.

programme.desc: Take a look back with a countdown of Dr. Pol’s most memorable cases.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Pol-ympic Games
programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Blue Ribbon Kids
programme.desc: It’s a best-of-the-kids compilation episode with the world’s most famous veterinarian.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: A Pol Lotta Pressure
programme.desc: From a baby reindeer clinging to life to an emergency birthing in the dead of winter, there is no rest for the vets.

programme.title: When Nature Calls: Snake, Rattle and Roll
programme.desc: Wild hogs in Florida must be relocated before they wreak havoc on homeowners' properties.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of America's Monuments
programme.desc: Archaeological discoveries beneath the Statue of Liberty reveal new insight behind the monument's incredible history, and facial recognition experts use cutting edge tech to finally uncover the true identity of this enigmatic lady.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Unearthed: Alcatraz's Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Alcatraz is home to secrets that only cutting-edge archaeology can reveal, and using the latest science and the newest tech, experts search for hidden evidence to investigate why so many tried and failed to escape America's toughest jail.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mount Rushmore: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Delving into the dark secrets behind one of the most iconic landmarks in America: Mount Rushmore. Scientists reveal the secret history of its creation, and what lies behind the rock.

programme.title: Unearthed: Alcatraz's Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Alcatraz is home to secrets that only cutting-edge archaeology can reveal, and using the latest science and the newest tech, experts search for hidden evidence to investigate why so many tried and failed to escape America's toughest jail.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Unearthed: Statue of Liberty: The New Secrets
programme.desc: The Statue of Liberty is one of the most iconic sights in the world, yet there are still secrets to be found and mysteries to be solved. Historians, archaeologists and engineers embark on a quest to unravel the inspiration behind her curious design.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Doomsday Volcano Mystery
programme.desc: A massive supervolcano beneath Naples, Italy may be on the verge of erupting again; Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns investigate this disturbing new evidence.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Tesla's Final Secrets
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla died before he finished a mysterious, earth-shattering invention, but the ground beneath his only remaining lab might hold clues. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns are the first to use cutting-edge tech to investigate Tesla's underground secrets.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Quest for the Gold Rush Fortune
programme.desc: Millions of dollars of stolen Gold Rush treasure is rumored to have been stashed in a cave in Northern California. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mass Grave Under Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Aliens Submerged
programme.desc: Rob examines a set of bizarre markings that suggest a violent clash between prehistoric beasts. In California, he investigates if a strange lake is a home to alien life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: New World Secrets
programme.desc: Rob investigates a cluster of ancient ruins in New England that suggest Europeans arrived in the Americas almost 1,000 years before Columbus. Then, he heads to California where a dormant super volcano may be showing new signs of life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Texan Mass Extinction
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Somebody's Watching
programme.desc: A fire chief's wife is found burnt to death in her home. An autopsy reveals the cause of death was not the fire, but a gunshot to the head, shocking this small Louisiana town. This arson turned homicide leaves a killer to be found.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Connecticut Horror Story
programme.desc: One summer night in 2007 comes as a nightmare for the Petit family when woken up by two strangers in their quiet, peaceful home of Cheshire, Connecticut. Suddenly this family of four finds themselves held hostage and in a fight for their lives.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cabin 28: Horror in the Woods
programme.desc: A mother and three teens are murdered in the remote town of Keddie, California. Despite a trail of suspects and illicit activity, no one was ever brought to justice. But recently discovered evidence may be the key to finally cracking case.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: My Father, The Serial Killer
programme.desc: Horror strikes a small Wisconsin town in 1980 after a young couple disappears and is later discovered in a field. Dubbed the Sweetheart Murders, it's almost 40 years before a woman comes forward saying her family holds the key to unlocking the case.

programme.desc: Robert Marshall loves his money and his mistress, but when his wife hires a PI to catch him in the act, who will pay? The passion between Lisa and Ron Hunter is electric, until a younger man jeopardizes their happiness. Will jealousy turn to murder?

programme.title: Deadly Affairs: A Fool's Bet
programme.desc: Virginia and Norman Larzelere live a life of luxury, but when Virginia turns to other men, her need for attention turns deadly.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Affair
programme.desc: After one partner in a marriage has an affair, the wife says she's moving forward. But with hidden back accounts, DNA testing kits and a gun, the woman is becoming unhinged. A deadly act of revenge leaves just one person to tell the tale.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Evidence of Love
programme.desc: A woman leaves her prominent, wealthy attorney husband to marry a convicted serial killer on death row? Rosalie Bolin says she fell for Oscar Ray Bolin, 'the love of my life,' while working on his case at the public defender's office 20 years ago.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Deadly Daughter
programme.desc: She spent 11 years in prison. But did Noura Jackson really murder her mother? The one-time party girl speaks out about the evidence that put her behind bars, the court decision that set her free, and suspicions that turned her own family against her.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Closing Time
programme.desc: While heading up the investigation of two separate homicide cases, Detective Pat Postiglione makes a surprising discovery. The same psychotic killer is behind all the murders and he has a unique calling card.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Stalked
programme.desc: 26-year-old Florence Ballino is found dead in her apartment in an unusual condition. Her attacker deliberately left behind clues in an attempt to confuse investigators. Detective Postiglione identifies one clue that inextricably connects to the killer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Ring
programme.desc: In 1987, Pat Postiglione is tasked with solving his first homicide: a young mother strangled to death inside her apartment. Without any viable suspects, Pat faces the daunting task of interviewing his only witness: the victim's 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Mile High Murder Mystery
programme.desc: Terence George is found shot to death in his own apartment and police are desperate to find answers. Terence's fiancée Tiffany Durst is nowhere to be found, leading investigators to dig into the young woman's rocky past.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Risky Business
programme.desc: When Bob Eidman is found executed in his office in broad daylight, the people of St. Charles are terrified a cold-blooded killer is on the loose. But when police discover Bob's secret life, they expose a slew of suspects with motive for murder.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Murder at Sunrise
programme.desc: When Kathryn Hauser is brutally murdered in her home, the residents of a posh Albuquerque neighborhood are stricken with fear. Police receive numerous tips, but it's a pair of shoeprints that leads them to a criminal who's stayed ahead of the law.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: The Key to Murder
programme.desc: Melinda Snyder's death stunned Rock Hill, SC, where even her closest friends came into question. The former homecoming queen's murder embroiled the quiet town in a mystery that wouldn't be settled until the South Carolina Supreme Court weighed in.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Route 29
programme.desc: In August 2013, a 17-year-old rising social media star and high school athlete disappeared along the infamous Route 29. A massive search by local and federal authorities yielded zero results until a security video revealed a chilling clue.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Joseph Stalin
programme.desc: It's clear Nazi Germany lost the war, but the real winner remains uncertain. At the Yalta Conference, the United States, Britain and the Soviet Union compete for domination of Europe.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: The Heroes Who Fought Back
programme.desc: A look at the brave men and women who fought back and showed courage in the face of danger in the attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: The Heroes Who Fought Back

programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Joseph Stalin
programme.desc: It's clear Nazi Germany lost the war, but the real winner remains uncertain. At the Yalta Conference, the United States, Britain and the Soviet Union compete for domination of Europe.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Nazi Jewel Heist
programme.desc: When the U.S. military takes over the German Kronberg Castle in 1945, a scandalous affair between a U.S. Army Captain and Air Force Officer ensues, resulting in one of the most elaborate treasure heists of all time.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Zoot Suit Riots
programme.desc: In pre-war America street gangs were on the rise. California media stirred up panic about young Mexicans and Latinos. When WWII began, racial tensions increased and they were quickly portrayed as a significant threat, leading to a racial boiling point.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Blackout Killers
programme.desc: Two serial killers take advantage of the blackouts in Nazi Germany and Britain that were meant to defend against enemy bombing.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Deacon Jim Miller: The Pious Assassin
programme.desc: His neighbours saw a devout family man. The last thing his victims saw was a shotgun aimed at their heads. If there's an outlaw who was born to kill its Deacon Jim Miller, the Bible-thumping psycho-killer.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Crystal Beach, Here We Come!
programme.desc: A young couple's new vacation home in Crystal Beach, Texas, requires a full gut, including a new kitchen, new bathrooms and a master suite. As walls are opened and floors are torn up, they realize their budget might not cover everything.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Texas-Sized Renovation On South Padre Island
programme.desc: A couple and their four kids are looking for a vacation retreat on South Padre Island in Texas. After recently renovating a rental property in the area, they've decided they are ready to get their hands dirty again.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Coastal Cottage
programme.desc: Michael finds a 1931 craftsman bungalow that just came on the market which is near the beach and only $65,000.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Family Legacy
programme.desc: The three build teams kick off their builds in unique, remote Alaskan settings. A family legacy cabin in the Wrangell Mountains, a guest cabin in Eagle Song, and an island getaway on Shelter Island.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Bump Outs and Burls
programme.desc: Alaskan builder Adam Tschappat's team is cut in half due to volunteer firefighter duties delaying his Family Legacy cabin build in the Wrangell Mountains. Mike Williams is facing a 100 degree change in temperature that forces him to focus on the farm.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Builder Mike Williams is in a mad scramble to save his peonies from dying. Dave and Hans's 50 thousand pounds of material make it to shore unharmed. Builder Adam Tschappat does some precision work from 2 logs to 12 logs high for his Family Legacy cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Plywood Don't Lie
programme.desc: Mike and his team gain some ground and try to keep it while laying plywood. Dave and Hans try and get reacquainted with their build. Adam comes face to face with his biggest fear for his cabin's success.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Lofty Goals
programme.desc: Mike Williams gets all 45 of his logs peeled and starts to stack and insulate his cabin. Dave and Hans deal with dangerous heavy fog on their boat journey to Shelter Island. Adam saves the day with an extra bag of cement.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Big Lift
programme.desc: Mike and his team get the rafters and roofing underway but with no lack of challenges. Dave and Hans are on their own with setting the extremely heavy ridge beam until help arrives. Adam successfully transports all of his logs to his build site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Bush Alaska Approved
programme.desc: The tides become the ultimate decider for Dave, Hans, and Steve, and send Steve to the workshop. For builder Adam and his family, the weather can't dampen their excitement as they finish their cabin. Mike is racing the first snowfall.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Roberts
programme.desc: A man and his fiancé would like to see their rustic camping cabin without plumbing transformed into a place they can entertain, use the bathroom indoors and enjoy multiple seasons.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Multi-Family Affair
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Grill Masters
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Breakfast Bonanza
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tour of tasty treats has convinced him that breakfast is the most important meal of the day, and he's inducting his favorites into the Man v. Food Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Good Eats: Myth Smashers
programme.desc: Chef/ scientist Alton Brown uncovers some of the biggest food myths.

programme.title: Good Eats: Urban Preservation: The Jerky
programme.desc: Alton Brown explores the wonderful world of beef jerky.

programme.title: Good Eats: Give Peas a Chance
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals all the tasty secrets behind peas.

programme.title: Good Eats: Dis-Kabob-Ulated
programme.desc: Alton demystifies the kabob with spicy beef kabobs and vanilla lime pineapple skewers.

programme.title: Good Eats: Turn on the Dark
programme.desc: Join Alton Brown for an hour- long special revealing the secret power of dark chocolate.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Memphis
programme.desc: Andrew visits Memphis and makes stops at some of the city's most beloved barbecue joints. Then, he drops by one of America's most iconic soul food restaurants and visits a joint where Italian and Southern comfort food are combined.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Andrew visits Philadelphia and reveals its status as a cultural crossroads by making stops at Mexican, Indonesian and Israeli restaurants. Finally, a trip to Philadelphia isn't complete without visiting the oldest Italian restaurant in America.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bay Area
programme.desc: California's East Bay area is a thriving multi-ethnic community. Andrew Zimmern highlights the culinary hot spots where Chinese Dim Sum, Indian Pani Puri, American Soul food and Mexican tacos are being served up in traditional style.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of the Dominican Republic, a meat-lover's paradise. From whole roast pig and crispy, Lebanese-inspired fried dough pockets to beef and plantain casseroles, Dominican gastronomy is full of surprises.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Emilia-Romagna
programme.desc: Andrew explores the region of Emilia-Romagna, Italy, and discovers ancient recipes and culinary classics including mortadella sausage, parmigiano reggiano, and tortellini in broth.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Oaxaca
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores regional specialties in Oaxaca, Mexico. From complex mole negro sauce over Mayan-era tamales and crispy tortilla with pork lard to egg bread dunked in hot chocolate, local tradition flavors each bite.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Cheese Glorious Cheese
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro proves that no matter how you slice it, cheese just makes everything better. Find out how TGI Fridays' cheddar bacon potato skin appetizer gets turned into a yummy chip and how Mom Made Cheesy Mac tastes.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Candy Critters
programme.desc: Gophers and bunnies and butterflies oh my! Even a vegetarian will want to snack on these creatures. Catch cheerful Albanese gummy butterflies in action and pop in on Savannah Candy Kitchen's chocolate gophers.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Biting Words
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean uncovers the wondrous ways behind some famous food clichés.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Gone Camping
programme.desc: Gear up and stake your tents as host Michael McKean sets up camp just in time for supper.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Brunch Beauties
programme.desc: Michael McKean skips breakfast and forgets about lunch so he can get to the bottom of brunch. He discovers how eggs Benedict was blessed by a pope and that we may have a melty mishap to thank for the croque monsieur.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Happy Birthday
programme.desc: Michael McKean makes everyone's birthday wishes come true as he celebrates the best holiday of the year. He discovers that birthday cake was born during a revolution and that a bowl of Chinese noodles can bring you more birthdays to celebrate.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Game Night
programme.desc: Michael McKean goes into the wild to hunt for juicy game meat myths and fresh fish fibs. He calls foul on duck a l'orange with its so-called French origins and throws a line at wicked tuna to find out how we got hooked on tuna melts.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Baked Goodies
programme.desc: Michael McKean throws the carb-free diet out the window and uncovers the stories behind our favorite baked goodies. He starts by revealing that cupcakes are edible equations and explaining how the whoopie pie nearly caused a civil war.

programme.title: Good Eats: Date Tripper
programme.desc: Alton tells everything you need to know to get dates into your culinary life, including three recipes for the 1960s classic 'Devils on Horseback' and a very 'scrummy' sticky toffee pudding.

programme.title: Good Eats: Hittin' the Sauce II
programme.desc: No matter how good of a cook you are, sooner or later your seafood is going to let you down. Alton Brown has the sauces that will save your dinner every time.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Fungal Gourmet: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2000 with new recipes for mushroom stroganoff and pickled mushrooms. Oh, and there's a visit from a certain insect who just so happens to be made of some of the same materials as mushrooms.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Choux Shine: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown finally turns this old show about pate a choux into what it always should have been: an episode about chocolate eclairs. That means a new pastry cream and a chocolate glaze.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Fry Hard I: The Reload

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Art Of Darkness II: The Reload

programme.desc: A body discovered in a park appears to be the work of Charles Hoyt, the imprisoned serial killer who once abducted and nearly murdered Jane. As Maura struggles to get inside the mind of the killer, Jane must keep her fear in check.

programme.title: The Closer: Fate Line
programme.desc: Brenda races against time on a multiple homicide case after finding clues on a cell phone.

programme.title: The Closer: Double Blind
programme.desc: The day has come for Brenda and Fritz to finally wed, but both are a bit preoccupied with work. While they each continue to pursue justice, entanglements on Brenda's squad are a bit too sour to resolve and it may mean someone leaving.

programme.title: The Closer: Products of Discovery
programme.desc: When Brenda's squad investigates the quadruple murder of a family, she accidentally stumbles into the middle of an FBI investigation that may have been a factor in the homicide.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: The Beast in Me
programme.desc: When an identity thief with no apparent identity of his own is found murdered in his car, the investigation leads Jane into Boston's checkered past. A startling discovery about the victim sends Maura on a personal quest.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: When the Gun Goes Bang, Bang, Bang
programme.desc: After an undercover cop working a narcotics-smuggling sting is shot dead, the killers next turn their sites on Boston homicide headquarters, leaving Jane, Maura and Frankie Jr. trapped in a fight for survival.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: We Don't Need Another Hero
programme.desc: Jane is honoured as a hero at a public event but the celebration is short-lived when disaster strikes. The ensuing case reunites Jane with an old high school flame who may be the person she needs to help her heal emotionally.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Fontaine/ Herman
programme.desc: A stay-at-home mother of four trades places with a high-powered executive mother.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Boyd/ Milorey
programme.desc: A mother of three who pushes her kids to be winners at everything they do swaps places with a housewife who serves her video-game obsessed son and husband dinner at their computers. Both families are driven up the wall by their new environments.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Mink and Oaks
programme.desc: Meet Kimberly Mink, a real-life rhinestone cowgirl mom and the world record holder in Women's Big Loop. Kimberly swaps places with Rebecca Oaks, a working mother of two boys who declares that she is the supervisor, manager and CEO of her family in Ohio.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Black Hole
programme.desc: Investigators search for clues after a body is discovered in a watery grave.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Letter
programme.desc: The sudden and mysterious death of a health conscious woman triggers an investigation into what killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Killer Snapshot
programme.desc: An amazing new forensic tool turns a cold case around.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Murder in the Church
programme.desc: Missy Bevers was a mom and a fitness instructor in her community. As she’s setting up for an early-morning workout class at the local church, surveillance cameras capture a disturbing series of images; her killer, lurking the halls.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Sugar Daddy Death
programme.desc: A married Google executive is found dead on his luxury yacht, those close to him are left baffled when the autopsy results are released. The only clue into Forrest Hayes’ death is a sexy woman seen on the boat’s surveillance.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: The Pastor's Secrets
programme.desc: Churchgoers knew something was up when pastor Matthew Winkler didn’t show up for services. After he’s found dead on his bedroom floor, twisted sex fantasies and dark family secrets start to surface.
