programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Factory of Death
programme.desc: After blackmailing his Southern California employers about their illegal employment practices, an undocumented factory worker vanishes.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Sacrament of Blood
programme.desc: Behind the cloak of his 'religion,' a Santeria priest allegedly murdered his lover, raped a minor and molested his step-daughter.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Fire and Murder
programme.desc: Police are on the hunt for Robert William Fisher for the murder of his wife Mary Fisher and two children. Honolulu couple John and Julieanne Dimitrion were indicted for mortgage fraud, using victims' money to fund their own lavish lifestyles.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Fighting for Life
programme.desc: A young father allegedly murders his parents in a haze of rage and drug addiction then abandons his child and flees to the American South.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Preaching Lies
programme.desc: The leader of the religious sect The River Road Fellowship, Victor Barnard is alleged to have collected ten young girls from his congregation into a group he names 'The Maidens.' When an escapee reports his abuse to the police, he is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Hill of Death
programme.desc: The Raneys must save an Oregon homestead trapped at the bottom of a 100 foot cliff separating them from four acres of land they need for food and livestock. Marty risks all forming a road up a bedrock cliff to a forest crawling with mountain lions.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The Raney family kicks off the most ambitious rescue ever, on their own 40 acres. As multiple generations gather to chip in, Marty attempts a dangerous river crossing to get thousands of pounds of gear to the homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Deconstructed: One If by River, Two If by Air
programme.desc: With extra facts and bonus scenes: An aerial supply mission faces turbulent skies as Marty breaks ground on foundation posts for his cabin. Misty and Maciah begin a greenhouse that requires lumber, but Matt and Katie must first troubleshoot the sawmill.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Days Are A-Comin'
programme.desc: With only two weeks left to finish their ambitious self-rescue, Marty races to complete the walls of the log cabin. Misty expands the garden and builds a goat shelter, while Matt takes the next generation on a hunt for gold.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tennessee Dome Home
programme.desc: A couple looks to build an eco-friendly, off-the-grid geodesic dome, cooled using geothermal caves, with a view of Tennessee's South Cumberland Mountain Range. But they're up against uncertain weather, an intricate design and treacherous mountain paths.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny House on a Lake
programme.desc: The Busbys have been living off-the-grid for two years already and want to take it to the next level. They build a super-efficient tiny house in northwestern Montana. Surrounded by stunning views, they'll build it all by hand.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Underground Living
programme.desc: Specialty builders Jon and Amanda D'Aleo design and build 'Earth-sheltered' homes for clients in Southern Colorado, but they weren't expecting a project this far off the grid.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Days Are A-Comin'
programme.desc: With only two weeks left to finish their ambitious self-rescue, Marty races to complete the walls of the log cabin. Misty expands the garden and builds a goat shelter, while Matt takes the next generation on a hunt for gold.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tennessee Dome Home
programme.desc: A couple looks to build an eco-friendly, off-the-grid geodesic dome, cooled using geothermal caves, with a view of Tennessee's South Cumberland Mountain Range. But they're up against uncertain weather, an intricate design and treacherous mountain paths.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Coastal Maine
programme.desc: Jason and Crystal always wanted an escape in the middle of Maine's secluded coastline for their family to unplug and enjoy nature. With the help of a small group of friends, they set their sights on building a 320-square-foot cabin in just 12 days.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Domes
programme.desc: Laura Williams is on a mission to build an off-the-grid home in the desert outside of Tucson, Arizona. She builds an earthen three-dome home by hand battling a steep learning curve and Mother Nature.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Gold Bars and Hail Mary's
programme.desc: In a mega-packed episode Todd is out of luck, and ground, until he makes a desperate play for new land. Parker's sitting pretty on a pile of gold, but pushes Rick too far. Tony attempts to jump start his season on a risky voyage up the Yukon River.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Devil's Finger
programme.desc: Just as safety inspectors arrive, Todd's son Hunter commits a serious violation. Parker is confronted by the owner of his new claim. Tony races against time to move the massive bucket-line of his second dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Holy Grail
programme.desc: Todd discovers an historic mine site that could turn his season around and battles monster boulders to get gold. Tony mounts a massive operation to replace a 24-ton bucket line and Parker's parents arrive for his birthday bearing extraordinary gifts.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Eclipsed
programme.desc: Hoffman's crew witnesses a solar eclipse. Parker transforms Rick's operation while he's away. The Beets crew takes the helm of the family barge on the Yukon River and runs it aground.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Beyond the Wall
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman gets a surprise ruling from the county, which kickstarts his season, Parker Schnabel's foreman Rick Ness returns to find his operation in a mess and Tony Beets' dredge hits a wall of permafrost that stops him getting to the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Lost Gold
programme.desc: Hunter Hoffman makes a rookie mistake that causes dysfunction in the team. Tony Beets has to improvise to tear down his second dredge. Parker Schnabel risks damaging his washplant as he races to finish his last cut at Scribner Creek.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Father, The Son, and the Holy Roller
programme.desc: Parker Schnabel's opens a brand-new cut, but his crew gets stuck in the mud. Todd tries to get Hunter back on the team to assemble a new wash-plant and Tony's stuck up the creek without a barge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Broken Men
programme.desc: Parker Schnabel takes on a massive wash-plant move on his own. Todd Hoffman races to set up new trommel and faces a medical emergency, while Tony Beets' daughter Monica makes a $200,000 mistake.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Of Monsters and Men
programme.desc: Parker threatens to shutdown Rick's Indian River operation after production takes a dive. Disaster strikes when Tony's son, Kevin takes a break to visit his girlfriend. Todd's crew scours the mountainside for gold after he gives them a shocking ultimatum.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Planes, Cranes, and Virgin Claims
programme.desc: Parker suspects Tony of sabotaging his new ground, and confronts him. Todd's wash-plants exceeds the limits for noise regulation and he must devise a solution. Tony starts to tear down his second dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: King Kong
programme.desc: Parker buys his first ever Klondike claim but gets an unpleasant shock when he test pans it. Todd uses chemical ingenuity to break a massive boulder standing in his way. Tony nearly loses a crew member during the tear-down of the dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Independence Day
programme.desc: Tony's dredge teardown hits a wall when they attempt to remove a heavy piece. Hunter demands a change of mine site. Parker bids for independence on his own claim, but Tony stands in the way.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Armed with a degree in archaeology and a passion for travel, Josh Gates investigates unsolved iconic stories across the globe. Immersing himself in different cultures to understand the world as they do, Josh hunts out the truth behind the legend.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Weight-shaming Victoria
programme.desc: Theresa sees a doctor about ongoing health issues. Victoria is harassed online for gaining weight. Later, she surprises a bachelorette party with a group reading. A mom seeks closure from the death of her 11-year-old daughter in a car accident.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: The Reunion
programme.desc: Theresa and Larry see each other for the first time in a year. A woman connects with her mom who choked to death. Then, a woman is reunited with her fiancé who shot himself during an internet video chat with her. Theresa does a house cleansing.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Six Little Dates
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric take the babies on special individual dates, revealing surprising facets of each baby's personality. Wales and Bridge have their first karate test, but Bridge makes a shocking decision. A bombshell leaves the family's future uncertain.

programme.desc: Matt's frustration grows as Amy continues to delay her move out of the farmhouse, but when COVID-19 hits, everything comes to a stop. The families come to terms with their new normal, and Zach and Jackson celebrate their birthdays in quarantine.

programme.desc: Coronavirus has hit the Waldrops hard. School and sports are on hold, and Courtney's parents can no longer provide much-needed help during the day. In addition, Eric stops construction on the remodel as the family faces an uncertain financial future.

programme.desc: Amy is preparing for a family trip back to Michigan. Chris plans on coming and Amy is nervous to share details about her past. Zach and Tori rush to move out of their old house before the family trip. Matt is eager to get a decision out of Amy.

programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Ice Lake Rebels: Slipping and Sliding
programme.desc: Stephan faces a dangerous trek as ice becomes slush. Kyle and Peyton seek shelter to save their boat from ruin. Pike Mike is injured in deep woods with no place to turn for help.

programme.title: Ice Lake Rebels: Breaking Up Is Hard to Do
programme.desc: Great Slave Lake is a minefield of melting ice. A truck sinks into the lake, Stephan and Allyce cut their boat free and keep it from being crushed then face a pack of wolves. Kyle abandons a snow mobile and struggles to get home amidst the chaos.

programme.title: Ice Lake Rebels: Fire and Water
programme.desc: Pike Mike falls into perilously cold water and has only minutes to be rescued. Kyle and Peyton find a bear near their home and reconsider houseboat living. Stephan causes a fire that may destroy everything.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Operation: Windmill
programme.desc: When the Browns welcome a trio of ostrich chicks to the ranch, a ravenous bear stalks the property in search of its next meal. Later, a determined wolf pack is taken to dangerous new heights when salvaging and transporting a 50-foot windmill.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Tanana's Last Stand
programme.desc: The largest wildfire in Alaskan history torches the land surrounding Tanana and threatens to devour the village. With state resources spread thin, the villagers must band together to battle the blaze or risk losing everything.

programme.title: Yukon Men: From the Ashes
programme.desc: After Alaska's largest wildfire ravages Tanana, the villagers must adapt their subsistence lifestyles to a new, even harsher reality. Two young homesteaders embark upon a dangerous journey in the hopes of starting a new life on the Cosna.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Operation: Windmill
programme.desc: When the Browns welcome a trio of ostrich chicks to the ranch, a ravenous bear stalks the property in search of its next meal. Later, a determined wolf pack is taken to dangerous new heights when salvaging and transporting a 50-foot windmill.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Tanana's Last Stand
programme.desc: The largest wildfire in Alaskan history torches the land surrounding Tanana and threatens to devour the village. With state resources spread thin, the villagers must band together to battle the blaze or risk losing everything.

programme.title: Yukon Men: From the Ashes
programme.desc: After Alaska's largest wildfire ravages Tanana, the villagers must adapt their subsistence lifestyles to a new, even harsher reality. Two young homesteaders embark upon a dangerous journey in the hopes of starting a new life on the Cosna.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold: Ruby Fever
programme.desc: Sixty Degree Resources, a small American mining company, returned to Greenland for another battle with the beast.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold: The Belly of the Red Beast
programme.desc: The American miners have their sights set on what team geologist Eric Drummond believes could be the largest ruby deposit in the Arctic. But Greenland's wild frontier soon plays havoc as the team struggles to return to its prized claim from last year.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Legendary Turtle of Texas
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to the swamplands of Texas in search of a giant alligator snapping turtle known as Raphael. Coyote is determined to prove that this turtle is the largest living creature of his kind.

programme.title: Hanging With the Hendersons: Meet the Pack
programme.desc: Colorado's Fox Hollow Animal Hospital is run by an endearing family of vets. Dr. Tony Henderson, and his sons Dr. Ross, Dr. Ryan and Cole, tackle everything from wonky-eyed chickens to a great dane with a funky tail.

programme.title: Hanging With the Hendersons: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Dr. Ross has his hands full when a sick dog is rushed to the clinic after eating a bag of pot. Dr. Tony and Dr. Ross help a pot-bellied pig rescue with some plus-sized problems. And, as Natalia and Dr. Ryan's wedding approaches, it's time to meet mom.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Dunk-A-Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Ross treats baby kangaroos and links up with the owners of a petting zoo to hold a fun event at the clinic to promote animal awareness. Dr. Blue removes a mass from a beloved pit-mix, and Dr. Lavigne treats a vision and hearing impaired Great Dane.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Emergency Engine Cat
programme.desc: Dr. Ross and vet tech Kyerra rush into action to save a stray cat that's been brutally mangled by a car engine. The Ross' move into their new home while Dr. Blue treats a 700lb arthritic pig. Dr. Lavigne sees a rescue Chihuahua with an incredible story.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Miracle Puppies
programme.desc: Dr. Blue needs to act fast when a Rottweiler in labour is rushed into the hospital with two puppies stuck inside her. Then, the three vets grab the reins and their cowboys hats to ride horseback into town for Houston's biggest rodeo parade.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Tuskegee Reunion
programme.desc: The docs visit their alma mater for a class reunion and become professors for a day. A Shih Tzu is rushed to the clinic after swallowing a large piece of rawhide while the owner of pit bull with a deformed leg must consider drastic surgery.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Wedding Day Blues
programme.desc: Dr. Blue surprises his wife with a romantic wedding vow renewal in Las Vegas. A Schnauzer boarding at the clinic needs medical help from Dr. Lavigne. Dr. Ross treats a very ornery parrot, and a senior dog with a recurring eye mass visits Dr. Blue again.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Dr. Blue Gets Tanked
programme.desc: Dr. Blue's love of fish has him wanting a home aquarium. Dr. Ross attempts to diagnose Layla, a Lab with bizarre test results, while Dr. Lavigne performs knee surgery on a bulldog. A lamb, headed to the county fair, suddenly has breathing problems.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Doctor Dads
programme.desc: Dr. Ross starts off the day with a trio of mischievous ferrets suffering from a skin condition. Bella, a 9-year-old Shepherd, is diagnosed with an extremely large tumor, and her family is faced with difficult decisions throughout her treatment.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Pelicans and Poachers
programme.desc: On the Gulf, oyster boats and fish retailers are inspected. Outside San Antonio, a poacher is caught after posting pictures. In East Texas, Game Wardens patrol deer camps and help a pelican in distress.

programme.title: Movie: Just Wright
programme.desc: A physical therapist falls for the basketball player she is helping recover from an injury.

programme.title: Movie: Boyz 'N the Hood
programme.desc: A coming-of-age film about Tre, a bright teenager who is sent to live with his father when his mother feels he needs a male role model. Tre's father guides him to choose the smartest path when he becomes torn between gang life and attending college.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Browns
programme.desc: After years of trying to make ends meet, a single mother of three finds out that the father she's never known has passed away. She decides to go to the funeral in hopes of getting to know a part of her family she never knew existed.

programme.title: Martin: Old School Loving
programme.desc: Gina gets too busy to take care of Martin.

programme.title: Martin: Cole on Ice
programme.desc: When Cole gets fired, Martin hires him.

programme.title: Martin: Housekeeper From Hell
programme.desc: Martin and Gina are afraid to terminate their tough new housekeeper.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: 'Tis the Cleveland to Be Sorry
programme.desc: Cleveland discovers that the food served at the local homeless shelter is much better than it is at home, so he pretends to be homeless to benefit from the meals.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Here Comes the Bribe
programme.desc: Donna drags Cleveland to marriage counseling after he botches their wedding vows renewal, but the counselor makes it clear that Cleveland can swing the 'treatments' in his favour - for a price.

programme.title: Martin: Three Homies and a Baby
programme.desc: Martin, Bro'man and Sheneneh babysit Martin's infant nephew Cameron, which Martin quickly regrets agreeing to do.

programme.title: Martin: Headin' for Trouble
programme.desc: Gina gets her head stuck in their new brass headboard while making love to Martin.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Love at First Fight
programme.desc: One of Vivian's college students' grades start to slide when she starts dating Will.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Waterfront Paradise vs. Garden District Home

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Ridgewood Riviera vs. Lakeview Luxury
programme.desc: A couple sells their CA home and are in a hurry to move to New Orleans. The wife would love a new construction in Uptown, while the husband is focused on location of new job.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Entertainers Dream vs. Broadmoor Estate
programme.desc: A single mom in New Orleans is looking for a home with more space and wouldn't mind buying a property that generates extra income. Then, Brittany makes simple changes to a home's layout to give it better flow so her clients get a quick sale.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Paradise Park vs. Italian Villa
programme.desc: A New Orleans couple needs a bigger home to support their growing family. He's willing to move outside the city limits, but she doesn't want to stray too far from the city. Later, Brittany and the team use a small budget to prep a condo for sale.

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Gallery Home vs. Luxe Greek Revival

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Neoclassical Revival vs. Bywater Beauty

programme.desc: Baseball legend Johnny Damon comes on board with a group of his rowdiest friends making the crew work double-time. June struggles to keep her radio on, which leaves Hannah frustrated. Jack and Travis get in hot water when they fail to respond to an alarm.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Docked and Loaded
programme.desc: Captain Sandy continues her on-going battle with Sirocco's anchors, while Joao and Travis continue their deep dive to set the anchors free. Baseball star Johnny Damon and his family and friends deal with bad weather and a feisty yacht owner.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Monte Car-loco
programme.desc: The crew enjoys a day off at an exclusive resort in Monte Carlo, but some of them are faced with more than they bargained for. Joao and Hannah have a heart to heart, while June tries to open herself up to Hannah with not so favourable results.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry for Me, Sirocco
programme.desc: Captain Sandy finds one of the crew member's positions redundant. Joao finally confronts Jack on his lack of work ethic giving him an ultimatum. An overwhelmed Anastasia is pushed to her breaking point in the galley. Then, Colin makes a bold move.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: It's Ben a Long Time
programme.desc: Colin faces a tough decision and Anastasia accepts her new role, but Sandy wonders if she's now phoning her job in. An all-female group come on board and do their best to flirt with the deck crew. Jack and Aesha move in together.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Nauti Girls Need Love Too
programme.desc: Ben's first dinner doesn’t wow the guests as much as he had hoped leaving him questioning if he still has his sea legs. Anastasia has a hard time adjusting back to her old third stew role.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Holy Ship!
programme.desc: Ben is determined to regain his sea legs, but Sirocco's faulty galley has other plans. Travis' latest drunken night has Sandy at the end of her rope. Jack ups his romance game by writing poetry for Aesha.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Great Car Hunt
programme.desc: Danny sees something in his shop that makes him very uncomfortable: emptiness. Danny sends the entire crew to the streets to find him cars but promises that he will be the one to return with the biggest and baddest catch of the day.

programme.title: Counting Cars: You Talkin' to Me?
programme.desc: A Hollywood icon confronts Horny Mike and Roli in the shop parking lot. Danny tries to diffuse the situation before it gets explosive.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Change of Heart
programme.desc: Danny has a last-minute change of heart and can't let go of a classic car he promised to sell to a loyal customer. Later, Kevin and Scott try to score a bike on their own, while Danny ditches lunch for a vintage Cadillac.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Sharon Rides Again
programme.desc: A motorcycle-loving couple wants to hit the road again like they used to. Sharon hasn't been able to ride comfortably since she lost a leg, so it's up to Danny and the crew to build a bike that is comfortable, safe and as cool as the couple that's riding.

programme.title: Counting Cars: It Hurst So Good
programme.desc: The Plymouth Road Runner has always eluded Danny, but when he finally finds one and buys it, it becomes a nightmare for Kevin. When Kevin tries to shut down the project, Danny pulls a fast one.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Danny's Dream, Kevin's Nightmare
programme.desc: Danny has wanted a Plymouth Roadrunner ever since a couple of car nuts pulled him over a few years ago and bought his Sebring on the spot. He's finally found one and he's doing it up exactly as he wants to. Meanwhile, Horny Mike takes on a project.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Cart of War
programme.desc: When Danny blows a gasket upon seeing his beloved golf cart covered in dirt, Kevin launches a plan to make Danny happy, and teach Mike a lesson.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Sailor's Soul
programme.desc: Representatives from Sailor Jerry enlist the shop's help to build a bike to commemorate the late artist's iconic style and to auction off at an upcoming charity fundraiser.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Zombie Truck
programme.desc: Kevin and Roli make an unplanned stop to check out a mysteriously small vehicle. Later, Danny gets a call from Rob Zombie who wants to customize a truck for his upcoming tour that kicks off in just seven days.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Heavy Metal
programme.desc: Danny impulsively buys a '69 Caddy and falls madly in love with her. Will he sell it for a big profit, or add her to his collection? Later, legendary rockers Judas Priest stop by to pick up a gift they had made for the band's newest member.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Searching for Soul
programme.desc: Danny is commissioned by Barry White's estate to find and restore the legendary singer's Stutz IV Porte. Meanwhile, an old pullover visits the shop with a custom job that could teach The Count a lesson.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Van-Tastic
programme.desc: Danny is so proud of the van he restored for his bandmate John Zito that he decides to give his own classic van a make-over. Later, Danny and Kevin pull over an NBA star and Danny gets some ink of his own.

programme.title: Counting Cars: One Love, One Car
programme.desc: Ziggy Marley commissions a restoration of his father, Bob Marley's, vintage Mercedes.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Marleymobile
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck as the shop rushes to finish restoring the last car Bob Marley ever owned.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Rocked and Loaded
programme.desc: Country rocker Andy Ross wants Danny to build the world's most patriotic muscle car ever made. Will a Second Amendment-inspired hot rod Corvette do the trick? Meanwhile, Roli blackmails Horny Mike into teaching him how to airbrush.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Trail Blazer
programme.desc: Music industry royalty, Del Bryant has a Blazer and he wants to pay tribute to his Tennessee roots. Meanwhile, Mike and Ryan check out a super rare 1963 Oldsmobile they think the Count has to own.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The King and the Count
programme.desc: Kevin and the team come together to make something special for Danny. Meanwhile Danny runs into an old pal and his 1959 Corvette gasser, but it's a ride once owned by the King himself that brings Danny to his knees.

programme.title: Counting Cars: A Legend on Two Wheels
programme.desc: When Danny is asked to create a commemorative bike that honours music legend Les Paul, he has to pull out all the stops and hopes his team can get it done in 30 days. Horny Mike wants to impress Danny and looks at a 1940 Dodge that's for sale.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Down by the Riviera
programme.desc: Legendary rocker George Lynch from the metal band Dokken stops by with his very cool 1965 Buick Riviera. He gives Danny free rein to put the Count's Kustoms rock 'n' roll touch on it. Also, Roli and Horny Mike custom wrap Roli's detailing van.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Pick Ups and Ponies
programme.desc: Danny gets started on a project that he's been waiting a long time to tackle, a 1971 Chevy C10 Pick Up. Later, Danny's bandmate Stoney gets in a fender bender and its Danny to the rescue.

programme.desc: A massive, alien-like fortress built into a mountainside is the central node to a network of pipelines that race outwards like tentacles; behind-the-scenes access reveals the secrets of why this strange complex was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Death Star
programme.desc: A Nazi fortress that could have changed history if it was finished, an underwater graveyard of unexpected American treasures, and a network of tunnels hiding a secret history of New York were abandoned for mysterious reasons, and experts investigate why.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Demons of the Devil
programme.desc: The latest science reveals that demons aren't just the stuff of horror stories, and as experts investigate shocking new archaeological evidence, they uncover the gruesome methods used to exorcise humans of demonic possessions.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Call of the Werewolf
programme.desc: New evidence reveals why a powerful hallucinogenic drug could be to blame for the werewolf, and people suspected of the power were hunted and killed, but even so, many admitted that they could become these deadly creatures.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Hunting the Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the truth behind the Loch Ness Monster, and experts investigate the world's most mysterious waters in search of evidence that a prehistoric monster could still be lurking in the deep.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Wrath of the Minotaur
programme.desc: A new excavation at the mysterious home of the Minoans leads to a startling discovery about real-life origins of the Minotaur, and experts decode artifacts that point to bloody human sacrifices for the ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Kraken Awakens
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that a sea beast like the Kraken could have existed, and experts examine a strange monster that could give shocking answers into this underwater mystery.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Dark Secrets of the Sphinx
programme.desc: New discoveries uncover the dark secrets of Egypt's strange half-man, half-lion beast, revealing why the pharaohs were so intent on transforming into this powerful and ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Revenge of the Cyclops
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that the cyclops, a one-eyed cannibal, could have been more than just a story.

programme.title: How It's Made: 1000th Product
programme.desc: On this episode of How It's Made, find out how Cycling Shoes, Yurts, Marine Plywood, and Encaustic Paint are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Tasers; Canned Soup; Jaw Harps & Mouth Bows; Diving Boards
programme.desc: On this episode of How it's Made: Tasers; Canned Soup; Jaw Harps & Mouth Bows; Diving Boards.

programme.title: How It's Made: Gears, Leather Watchbands, Vitrelle Dishes, Kitchen Shears
programme.desc: Watch how they make gears, leather watchbands and vitrelle dishes.

programme.title: How It's Made: Pipes, Rock Climbing Gear, Leather Bike Saddles, Luxury Sports Cars
programme.desc: How pipes are manufactured, what goes into making climbing gear, making leather bike saddles and how luxury sports cars are made.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hold the Line
programme.desc: In August 1992, millionaire Tennessee landowner Allen Roberts arrives home to discover his wife is missing. He tells police he received a ransom call for Doe's safe return. Slowly, the town turns on Allen: until police take note of one odd neighbor.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hunting Season
programme.desc: A 27 year old mother of two disappeared from a small vacation town in Wisconsin in 2008. Family, friends, local reporters and police investigators recall the fear and sadness the shocking crime instilled on their tight-knit community.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: We're Watching You
programme.desc: 40 year-old Rachael Anderson, mother of four, calls an old friend one Friday evening in April 2010 about a home improvement project she'd never complete. Eight years later, she's still missing, and two men are behind bars.

programme.title: Homicide City: The Thin Blue Line
programme.desc: A skeleton is discovered on the edge of a high school football field, during a game of catch. It takes a forensic sculptor, tireless detective work, and some luck, to finally bring the mysterious killer to justice.

programme.title: Homicide City: Deadly Circle of Friends
programme.desc: The slaying of a young mother and her family provide detectives with a chilling link to another murder gone cold. Now, they must work fast to make an arrest before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Quiet the Dogs
programme.desc: After Connie Hilton and her husband George leave Dallas and move to a rural enclave in East Texas, life couldn't be more perfect. But one early September morning, their peaceful, easy-living country life is abruptly and brutally shattered for good.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Fatal Friendship
programme.desc: When recent high school graduate Stephanie Neiman gives her friend Summer Hair a ride in small town Oklahoma, what starts out as a favor quickly becomes a struggle to survive.

programme.title: Homicide City: Deadly Circle of Friends
programme.desc: The slaying of a young mother and her family provide detectives with a chilling link to another murder gone cold. Now, they must work fast to make an arrest before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Quiet the Dogs
programme.desc: After Connie Hilton and her husband George leave Dallas and move to a rural enclave in East Texas, life couldn't be more perfect. But one early September morning, their peaceful, easy-living country life is abruptly and brutally shattered for good.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Desert Drifter
programme.desc: Three teenage boys looking for adventure in the peaceful and secluded high desert of California's Indian Creek run into a drifter with a mission to kill.

programme.title: Homicide City: The Thin Blue Line
programme.desc: A skeleton is discovered on the edge of a high school football field, during a game of catch. It takes a forensic sculptor, tireless detective work, and some luck, to finally bring the mysterious killer to justice.

programme.title: Evil Kin: The American Nightmare
programme.desc: Family is everything in Korean culture. But when the Suh family starts a new life in America, tradition turns to rebellion. Their American dream soon becomes a nightmare as they find out the road to riches is paved with betrayal…and blood.

programme.title: Evil Kin: A Mother's Fight
programme.desc: For an optometrist and his wife, life with their beautiful daughters is all they could ever dream of. But this dream will soon become a nightmare. And others will reveal the extremes they are willing to go to possess everything they love.

programme.title: Village of the Damned: The 'Curse' Begins at Christmas
programme.desc: In 1989, in peaceful Dryden, New York, a Christmastime massacre claims an entire family. Just when it seems the horror has passed, terror visits Dryden again. With these events, a so-called "curse" will descend on Dryden for ten years.

programme.title: Village of the Damned: Thirteen Days in Winter
programme.desc: For thirteen days in winter, the Dryden community searches for a little girl missing in the blinding snow. Not even the police suspect the horrible truth. Three years later, the 'curse' of Dryden returns when a love triangle turns to murder.

programme.title: Village of the Damned: Dryden's Dark Soul
programme.desc: As Dryden's dark cloud, two love stories turn to tragedy. In 1993, a woman awakes to see one friend murder another in a fit of jealous rage. Just a year later, Dryden's beloved football coach crosses paths with his daughter's deranged ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Village of the Damned: The Final Fall
programme.desc: As news of the football coach ripples across town, Dryden prays the worst is over. But in September 1996, a month of terror brings the "curse: to a crescendo. Three tragedies will lead outsiders to call Dryden the 'Village of the Damned.'

programme.title: Village of the Damned: The Final Fall
programme.desc: As news of the football coach ripples across town, Dryden prays the worst is over. But in September 1996, a month of terror brings the "curse: to a crescendo. Three tragedies will lead outsiders to call Dryden the 'Village of the Damned.'

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: Jayme Closs Comes Home
programme.desc: Eighty-eight days after Jayme Closs's parents were murdered and she disappeared from her home in Barron, WI she miraculously appeared from out of the woods in Gordon, WI. She was thin and frightened but alive. Reported by CBS News correspondents.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dead Ringer
programme.desc: A family man targeted for death lives to climb out of his own 'grave.' Go inside the sting that took down a hit man-for-hire scheme.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Fatal Crossing
programme.desc: A beautiful mom and her young daughter are found dead near train tracks under mysterious circumstances. Questions from '48 Hours' help get police to reopen the case.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder, Modesty, and the Pastor
programme.desc: Corinne isn't a demanding woman - she just wants what many lonely people want: a second chance at love. And when she meets Calvin Stoudt she finally gets it. But a too-close roommate and a monstrous past turn this second chance into a deadly battleground.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Sex, Lies, and Secret Texts
programme.desc: Cassie is a free-spirited bartender when she meets family-guy Brent - the rock to her roll. But a spark this intense is doomed to explode... and a bright light extinguishes in tragedy.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder in the Marina
programme.desc: Ed is a retired pilot whose sense of adventure is reawakened by a seaside encounter with the much-younger Denise. The couple sets up an idyllic life on a boat in a Florida marina until a sudden change in fortune rocks the couple's romantic seas forever.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: American Nazis
programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Civil War Conspiracies
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: The Heroes Who Fought Back
programme.desc: A look at the brave men and women who fought back and showed courage in the face of danger in the attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Billy the Kid: The Phantom of Lincoln County

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Clearwater Camp
programme.desc: The team take on a cabin in Industry, ME, that hasn't been touched since the 1970's. Loads of issues arise once the snow melts and they start digging in.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Overload

programme.title: Building Alaska: I Need Five Hands

programme.title: Building Alaska: Absolutely Insane
programme.desc: The Konduses fight the rain and shattered window panes deep in the White Mountains. Mike and Teresa's team gets stuck on slippery scaffolding 19 feet in the air while Paige and Cody's build stalls thanks to a material ordering snafu near the deadline.

programme.title: Building Alaska: It's Gonna Be Plush
programme.desc: It's a race to the finish as Paige and Cody wrap up before dog racing season in Cantwell while Mike and Kathleen lose all their help deep in the White Mountains. Meanwhile, the Oldenkamps struggle with the challenges of working on a grain-bin-style cabin.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Ocean View Open House
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are ready to sell the first house they ever built in Hawaii, but the Ocean View house needs some freshening up first, including replacing a rotted-out back lanai.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Powder Room Predicament
programme.desc: Nicole's next project is restoring a historic mansion in the Summit district of St. Paul. Unfortunately, some key rooms have been completely ripped apart, and her first task is to rebuild the gutted powder room from scratch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Distressed Dining Room
programme.desc: Nicole turns her attention to taking the pink and gold kitsch out of the formal dining room. Restoring the floors, swapping out sconces and repairing the stained glass windows take the room out of the 1970s and back to 1904.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: In at the Deep End
programme.desc: Nicole cleans up the swimming pool and converts some garage space into a much needed changing room area. Tapping into the sewer line causes more mess than she bargained for, while Nicole also finds some time to take some swimming lessons.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Living Room Cover Up
programme.desc: Nicole takes on the living room and study, restoring the rooms to their former 1904 glory by polishing up the original woodworking details in the rooms.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Brick by Brick Restoration
programme.desc: The Summit mansion hasn't been painted since 1972 and needs a major face lift. After years of damage, all of the outdoor wood railing and detail are rotting and need to be replaced.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Brightening the Bedrooms
programme.desc: Nicole tackles the upstairs bedrooms and bathroom which have had their natural beauty covered in old wallpaper and fixtures.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Up and Away
programme.desc: Nicole puts a modern twist on the 1904 Summit Mansion in St. Paul when she installs an elevator in the middle of the home.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: Nicole finds her home in Minnesota to be flooded from burst pipes due to the extreme cold. She and her crew try to discover where all they leak are located in the house.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Catskills Cabin: The Whole Story
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders visit a new region of the Appalachian mountains.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Piece En Piece
programme.desc: The builders learn some new skills when Mark Bowe buys a cabin with a strange design called Piece en Piece.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Wild Rock Pavilion
programme.desc: The builders work with three centuries of materials and techniques in one project. Using custom 21st century steel brackets and hand-hewn 19th century beams, they create a pavilion for the Wild Rock Community Center.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Transforming a Shipping Container Into a Portable Barnwood Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys turn a used shipping container into a portable barnwood cabin. They use welding torches and old logs to transform the steel container into a home. Mark searches for the perfect red barnwood to cover it.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Backyard
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders take the week off to work in their own backyards.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Turning a Ramshackle Cabin Into a Guest House In Missouri
programme.desc: The guys take down and rebuild a historic 170-year-old cabin. Sherman leads the guys in converting this cabin into a guest house for kindred spirit client, Mark Perry.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire Festivals
programme.desc: Join the party as Roger Mooking visits three of the greatest fire-roasted ragers that cook mountains of meat and keep the barbecue faithful lining up for more. He attends a church picnic with nearly four tons of meat and a crowd of 4,000 carnivores.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Five Bbq Chicken Favorites
programme.desc: Roger Mooking has plucked his way through plenty of barbecue chicken, but only the very best birds make this list of his top five favourites.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Whole Animals
programme.desc: Roger's learning to rig up and roast whole animals with some truly wild techniques. First he'll learn an ancient Argentine method of roasting lamb upright over coals by hanging them on cast iron crosses in the open air.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fishing For Fire
programme.desc: In a pit, under a kettle, or in between hunks of heavy metal, Roger's showing off three flame-licking good feasts that are packing high heat.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New Orleans, LA
programme.desc: Casey heads to New Orleans to taste the best of the Big Easy, including a mammoth po' boy and a four-pound sundae packed with eight large scoops of ice cream and smothered with eight different toppings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest
programme.desc: Casey’s criss-crossed the country chowing down on the best eats American has to offer, and its time to honour the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes in Man vs. Food history into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Bring the Heat
programme.desc: In Casey's years of facing off against food, he's taken on his fair share of heat. Casey's counting down the hottest, culminating in a challenge so spicy it may crack the Scoville scale and the number.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Queens
programme.desc: Stoke strongman Eddie Hall visits cosmopolitan Queens, NY, to make a solo attempt at a huge Greek kebab banquet, sample the best Chinese dumplings and try his hand at baseball.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Dallas-Fort Worth

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Throwin' Down In Beantown

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Awesome In Asheville

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phoenix
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the multicultural cuisine of Phoenix, Ariz. A heavy Mexican influence is present throughout the restaurant scene in dishes like chilaquiles and pazole.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Boston is the heart of New England, the birthplace of American independence and home to so many delicious foods that it calls for more than one visit! Andrew Zimmern explores the flavours of Boston neighborhoods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Totally Unexpected

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Best Meal Deal

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feast of the Middle East

programme.desc: When Professor Von Drake’s sonar-detecting machine discovers that there’s something big at the bottom of Mickey Lake, Mickey and the gang hop into the Clubhouse Submarine and set out to find the 'Big Something'.

programme.title: Bluey: Rug Island/ Hairdressers/ Sticky Gecko
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Pit Stop and Go!/ Alarm on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's the first 'Pit Stop and Go Rally' where pit crews compete against each other. The Happy Helpers look after Clara Cluck's farm while she's out of town.

programme.title: Bluey: Wagon Ride / Taxi / The Beach
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo take a wagon ride with their Dad to the park; Bluey has a taxi service with her Dad as her first passenger; Bluey tries to catch up to her Mum on the beach.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey Mousekersize!
programme.desc: When Pete can hardly get through a game of basketball without collapsing from exhaustion, Mickey and his Clubhouse pals show Pete the fun of exercising, leaving the big cat feeling stronger, more energetic, happy and healthy.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Little Parade
programme.desc: When the wind-up toy musicians get over-wound and scatter about, it's up to Mickey and pals to retrieve the trio in time for the Little Parade.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Mickey convinces his friends to search for a treasure because he believes there is one.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Color Adventure
programme.desc: Mickey's Rainbow Color Machine runs out of color, which starts to cause a problem.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Goofbot
programme.desc: Goofy needs some help building his toy robot for today's Toy Fair.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: The Friendship Team
programme.desc: Minnie and Daisy team up to find the missing hats for the Clubhouse Friendship Day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey and Minnie's Jungle Safari
programme.desc: Minnie is determined to snap a photo of the Hula Hibiscus that only blooms once a year.

programme.title: Chuggington: Wild Safari Park / Glow Koko
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Clarabelle's Clubhouse Mooo-sical

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Giganto's Laugh/ Treasure!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Fantastic Pet Force / Sea No Turtle
programme.desc: The puppies leap into action to assemble their own real-life team of puppy heroes. Bob takes the pugs on a conservation vacation where he volunteers to study sea turtles.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: Vampirina: Chrysalis Amiss / Bringing Down the House
programme.desc: Vampirina faces challenges as the new kid in town, making friends and attending school.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: Bodhi faces his fear to earn his final stamp towards becoming a Super Flier. After Mia gets a thorn stuck in her paw, she worries it will hurt when K.C. tries to take it out.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Lost Lovey/ Diggity Dog
programme.desc: Mia loses Lovey, so Pip and Freddy go on a wild chase to find it. The Fliers' delivery is in jeopardy when their puppy student becomes the master at digging.

programme.title: Bluey: Squash / Charades / Bingo
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: ARF's Robot Wish / Missing Collar Mission
programme.desc: When ARF wishes that he had a brother, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to help him find a robot sibling. When Bingo and Rolly's collar accidentally gets mailed to Bonnie in Africa, the pugs go on a mission to get them back.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke

programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Inferiority Complex

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Club Election
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are pitted against each other for the presidency of their women's club.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Ma Makes Three
programme.desc: Feeling sorry for a lonely Sophia, Dorothy allows her to come along on a date with her and Dorothy's latest beau. However, pretty soon Sophia begins tagging along on every date which puts a rift in Dorothy's romantic plans.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Larceny and Old Lace
programme.desc: Sophia's latest boyfriend, Rocco, claims to have been involved in the mob. When the girls discover a bag of Rocco's with thousands of dollars in it, they assume he robbed a bank.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose's Big Adventure
programme.desc: Rose's latest boyfriend has just retired and she is ready to spend a whole lot more time with him, but his retirement quickly turns him into a couch potato. Meanwhile, the girls deal with remodeling the garage into a guest room.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mister Terrific
programme.desc: Rose begins to date 'Mr. Terrific', a kiddie show host, who gets fired when Dorothy gets a part-time job as a consultant on the show, a job he helped her get.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mother's Day
programme.desc: While waiting for phone calls from their children wishing them a happy Mother's Day, the girls reminisce about past Mother's Days.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Yes, We Have No Havanas
programme.desc: Blanche's latest boyfriend is a charming Cuban who sweeps her off her feet, but she's not the only one when Blanche discovers he's been dating Sophia behind her back.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actors Julie Gonzalo and Ronnie Rowe from Hallmark Channel's movie 'Jingle Bell Bride' visit. Later, Grammy award-winning singer Cyndi Lauper shares how her podcast is helping people with psoriasis.

programme.title: Movie: A Royal Winter
programme.desc: A woman flies to Europe for some soul searching, and sight-seeing, with a friend. While there she encounters a handsome European playboy prince.

programme.title: Movie: My Best Friend's Bouquet
programme.desc: A woman accidentally catches a wedding bouquet before her engaged friend. She is then reminded of a family myth that puts her friend’s happiness at stake.

programme.title: Movie: Love Under the Stars
programme.desc: A woman in her 30s, who has refused to grow up, is forced to face reality. After meeting a young woman and a widower, she begins to re-evaluate her ideas about life and being an adult.

programme.title: South Park: I Should Have Never Gone Ziplining
programme.desc: The boys' ziplining adventure becomes a terrifying test of survival.

programme.title: South Park: Sarcastaball
programme.desc: The people of South Park Elementary address the crisis in football concussions.

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park: Stanley's Cup
programme.desc: Hitting rock bottom, Stan finds himself without a job, no bicycle and the only way out of his situation is to coach the peewee hockey team. Stan is about to find out that being a coach means facing his past, reliving a life he would rather leave behind.

programme.title: South Park: You're Getting Old
programme.desc: Just after Stan's tenth birthday, his worldviews start to change and so do his friendships.

programme.title: South Park: Ass Burgers
programme.desc: Cartman must find a way to deal with his Asperger's Syndrome.

programme.title: South Park: Hummels and Heroin
programme.desc: Beloved entertainers are being cut down in their prime due to massive overdoses of opiates. Stan is about to be exposed as the source of the illegal drugs.

programme.title: South Park: Asspen
programme.desc: While the adults are trapped at a time-share sales meeting, Stan is challenged by the best skier on the mountain to compete for the prettiest girl's affections.

programme.title: South Park: Trapped in the Closet
programme.desc: Scientologists converge on Stan's house after he is identified as the reincarnation of L. Ron Hubbard. One A-lister locks himself in the closet and refuses to come out, after Stan criticizes his 'talent.'

programme.title: South Park: My Future Self n' Me
programme.desc: When a 32-year-old man claiming to be Stan from the future shows up in South Park, young Stan is forced to come to terms with the loser he will become.

programme.title: South Park: Douche and Turd
programme.desc: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one. When Stan refuses to vote for the ridiculous choices, Puff Daddy shows up and tells him to 'vote or die.'

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: October 21, 2020
programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: South Park: Red Hot Catholic Love
programme.desc: A sexual abuse scandal involving Catholic priests hits South Park and is taken all the way to the Vatican.

programme.title: South Park: Tonsil Trouble
programme.desc: After a routine tonsillectomy goes horribly wrong, Cartman comes face to face with his own mortality.

programme.title: South Park: Insheeption
programme.desc: When Stan is sent to the school counsellor because he's holding on to an obscene number of useless possessions, he realizes that Mr. Mackey has a hoarding disorder too.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: October 21, 2020

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: South Park: Up the Down Steroid
programme.desc: Cartman must convince a qualifying committee that he's handicapped in order to win the Special Olympics. Meanwhile, Jimmy is determined to win the Olympics at any cost.

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O
programme.desc: Stan and Kyle become obsessed with Guitar Hero to the point where they're breaking high score records, and it doesn't take long for Stan to realize that he could go even further with a different partner.

programme.title: South Park: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy
programme.desc: An elementary school teacher in South Park is conducting an illicit affair with a student while Cartman becomes the new school hallway monitor. When a student in his jurisdiction commits an infraction, Cartman takes it a little too personally.

programme.title: South Park: Fatbeard
programme.desc: Cartman's dream of living the life of a pirate will come true if he can just get to Somalia. When he doesn't find a crew of swashbucklers, he assumes command and leads the Somalian pirates to a glory of riches.

programme.title: The Closer: Blood Money

programme.title: The Closer: Red Tape
programme.desc: Sgt. Gabriel shoots a murder suspect he is certain is armed and firing at him, but the evidence doesn't seem to match up. A Force Investigator is sent in to check things out, interfering with Brenda's murder investigation.

programme.title: The Closer: Walking Back the Cat
programme.desc: Brenda and her squad are temporarily deputized into the FBI when a missing persons case turns into a full-blown murder investigation involving drug trafficking at gay dance parties.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Living Proof
programme.desc: Jane and Maura's relaxing day at an outdoor spa is anything but when they discover the murder of a pregnant woman serving as a surrogate mother. Soon the hunt is on the find the baby's biological parents.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sailor Man
programme.desc: Shortly after sailors invade the streets of Boston for Fleet Week a young girl is found dead. Frost's father, a Navy Admiral, comes to town, causing tension with his son. Maura goes on a date with Angela's mechanic.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Brown Eyed Girl
programme.desc: When the daughter of a police officer is kidnapped, Jane and the team race to find her, fearing the abduction is connected to another case where a young girl turned up dead only hours earlier.

programme.title: Movie: Sister Act
programme.desc: A lounge singer witnesses a murder by her mobster boyfriend and hides out in a convent.

programme.title: Movie: Sister Act 2: Back in the Habit
programme.desc: Lounge singer Deloris returns to the convent to help choral students save their school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Who Killed Chandra Levy?
programme.desc: Intern Chandra Levy vanishes in May of 2001 in Washington, D.C. Her cell phone and keys are found by police in her apartment that shows no signs of trouble, leading them to question where she went and who saw her last.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Legend of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Josh heads to the jungles of Central America to investigate the legendary crystal skull that was discovered by a renowned adventurer who was the inspiration for Indiana Jones. Josh probes whether the skull is a lost relic or archaeology's tallest tale.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Josh follows in the footsteps of Indiana Jones as he searches in Israel and Ethiopia for the lost Ark of the Covenant, the sacred relic said to contain the Ten Commandments and possess extraordinary powers.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Ruby Slippers
programme.desc: Josh investigates the theft of the ruby slippers worn by Judy Garland in the 1939 classic movie, The Wizard of Oz.

programme.title: Back to the DeLorean: Time Machine Rescue
Gold Rush: New Season Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Get a sneak peak at the new season of Gold Rush.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Searching For America's Lost Flight
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates why Northwest Flight 2501 vanished, taking the lives of all 58 people on board.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mayan Apocalypse
programme.desc: Josh unearths human skulls and ancient Mayan sacrificial alters in the caverns underneath the jungles and ruins of Mexico while investigating the fall of the remarkable Mayan Empire.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Josh hunts down new evidence on the iconic disappearance of Amelia Earhart. He first treks to uncharted tribal lands of PNG, then ends his journey in Fiji hoping to uncover the human remains of Amelia.
