programme.desc: Josh hunts down new evidence on the iconic disappearance of Amelia Earhart. He first treks to uncharted tribal lands of PNG, then ends his journey in Fiji hoping to uncover the human remains of Amelia.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Return of Freddy Dodge
programme.desc: To save his season, Rick drafts a Gold Rush vet and former member of team Hoffman. Chasing a record-breaking goal, Parker orders an unachievable goal. Tony and Monica fire up their wash plant as they battle to beat Parker to the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Hoffman's Ghosts
programme.desc: New mine boss Rick is buckling under debt, if he's going to prove himself to his crew he needs to get his first gold weigh. Parker attempts a treacherous river crossing and Tony Beets hits a snag removing a massive piece of his million-dollar dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Hazard Pay
programme.desc: Rick needs a quick fix from Freddy Dodge to keep his season on track. Parker races to get his second wash plant running, but struggles. Tony needs to re-float his sunken dredge and turns to a familiar face from the Hoffman crew for a solution.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Stormageddon
programme.desc: Torrential rains hit the Klondike and Parker and Rick battle to save their mining operations from being flooded out. Tony sends son Mike on his first voyage as Captain on his tug the Kid Commando.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Megamorphosis
programme.desc: Parker's biggest wash plant collapses. Rick makes a shocking discovery and asks his dad for help. A crucial piece comes crashing down as Tony dismantles his dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Father's Day
programme.desc: Rick and his dad battle together to open a new cut. Parker struggles with mechanical breakdowns. Tony dismantles his Dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Resurrection
programme.desc: Dean keeps the claim running when the flu brings Parker's operation to its knees. Rick's mechanic Carl is acting weird. Tony hits rock bottom.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Devil's Deadline
programme.desc: Rick is forced to ask Tony for help and Parker runs a 24-hour test of his ground and suffers another washplant failure. Tony hauls the final piece of his million-dollar second dredge from Thistle Creek and prepares to rebuild it.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Sucker Punch
programme.desc: Rick Ness and Freddy Dodge discover an issue with the wash plant, potentially losing Rick thousands in gold. Parker must risk using a dozer to move his biggest wash plant and Tony's daughter Monica battles to keep their dream of a 6000 ounce season alive.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Old School Heroes
programme.desc: Rick makes a disastrous mistake that shuts down his claim; Parker threatens a long time member of the crew with demotion and Tony resurrects an ancient wash plant in an attempt to get back in the game.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Wedding Bells and Emergency Operations
programme.desc: Parker tasks Brennan with moving wash plant Big Red in just 24 hours. Rick's crew struggles when someone falls prey to a life-threatening illness. Wedding bells ring in the Yukon as the Beets family prepares for the marriage of Tony's daughter Monica.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Broken Bones
programme.desc: Parker crashes a boat resulting in a terrible injury. Frozen ground and machine failure threaten Rick's season. Tony and family finally rebuild his second dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Make it Rain
programme.desc: Tony and his family attempt a dangerous crane operation. Rick fights frozen ground. Parker pushes wash plant Sluicifer beyond the limit.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Holding Mom Hostage
programme.desc: When hot-tempered David moved back in with his 93-year-old mother, he quickly filled her home with clutter. Now, the dangerous living conditions, and David's short fuse, have his elderly mom cornered.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Meet the Slaton Sisters
programme.desc: The Slaton's are larger-than-life sisters who have always relied on each other and food for support. Amy, age 31, is desperate to have children, but hasn't been able to due to her weight. While Tammy, age 32, is one step away from being bedridden.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: 1,000 Pounds to Freedom
programme.desc: Amy and Tammy go to Atlanta to meet Dr. Procter to discuss weight loss surgery. When they arrive, Dr. Procter gives Tammy a hefty weight loss goal before he will approve her for surgery, meanwhile the Dietician has more bad news for Amy.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Amy and Tammy eagerly begin their weight loss journey. Sticking to their diets is a matter of life or death but proves to be a real struggle. The pressure to reach their goals culminates in a huge fight that threatens their diets and relationship.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bullets and Lies
programme.desc: A couple is suspected of killing a deer during off-season. Warden Iles transports orphaned baby armadillos for rehabilitation, and Warden Gould searches for a mountain lion that is lurking near a recreational park in Laredo.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Old Warrants Die Hard
programme.desc: A game warden has a run-in with an acrobatic squirrel. A Mexican shrimp boat may have an illegal catch. Fishing without a license leads to a trip to jail. A mystery UTV caught-on-tape has a surprising driver. Some kids are found in a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Chasing a Dead Man
programme.desc: In Llano County, a jet skier's life is spared after an explosion on the water. When a man fakes his own death, Warden Herchman and Stapleton join forces to track him down, and a man is found trespassing while fishing.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Capsized Canoe Rescue
programme.desc: An investigation sparks when Warden McDermott discovers an abandoned truck, and a group of paddlers are rescued from their capsized canoe. On "Old Home Day", Warden Demler patrols the ATV trails, and an injured barred owl gets a second chance.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: Newly promoted Sgt. Lucas shows Trainee Frye the ropes during a busy ATV weekend. Hannett attempts to rescue an injured heron and later faces off with a moose. And lost hikers turn to Holmes for help as the sun goes down and temperatures drop.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Close Encounters of the Wild Kind
programme.desc: When Maine's wildlife wanders into human territory, it's game wardens to the rescue. Wardens Marquis and Fitzpatrick try to catch a dumpster-diving bear. A wily woodchuck gives Warden Lounder a run for his money.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: The Good, the Bad, the Smelly
programme.desc: The New Hampshire Conservation Officers are equipped to handle any situation that nature can throw at them, including a dangers timber rattlesnake, and a family of skunks that have been separated.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Just One More ...
programme.desc: The rule is clear: one hunter one deer. But some hunters are greedy and the wardens are there to stop them. Plus, a deputy joins his first night-hunting stakeout, LaFlamme searches for an arrow that can help solve a mystery and a family covers up a crime.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The End Is Near
programme.desc: A Facebook post leads the wardens to a gang of poachers, which turns into a manhunt when the ringleader skips bail. The wardens capture a flock of nuisance wild turkeys and search all night for a rabbit hunter lost in the snowy woods.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Throttle Out
programme.desc: A sledder takes a jump that lands him in the hospital and the wardens investigate the crash. The wardens chase down a group of drunk snowmobilers. A strange pile of animal parts in the snow leads the wardens to a family of poachers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cold as Ice
programme.desc: A Smartphone with video evidence of a crime leads to a poacher. Two drunken sledders run over a warden and are chased through the woods. Herring hunts down a man that he knows with arrest warrants. LaFlamme helps a herd of deer in distress.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Senior Dog's Decked Out Dorm
programme.desc: A family needs help making their mountain cabin safer for Chickie, a blind senior dog.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Superfly Parrot Palace
programme.desc: With their home doubling as a rescue for dozens of parrots, the Brewer family needs Antonio's help. Antonio helps the family reclaim their kitchen and dining room, and builds a huge geodesic dome to give these colorful birds space to spread their wings.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Football Pup Palace
programme.desc: Turf, the 'wildlife control officer' for the Seahawks, is a working dog with messy habits. Antonio helps his owners turn their laundry room into a fully operational doggy spa and transforms the lackluster backyard into a football-themed doggy paradise.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Condo Cat Creation
programme.desc: Antonio Ballatore transforms a cramped condo with two cats and a rescue dog. The sledgehammers come out as the team knock down kitchen walls, build personalized pet spaces into the stairs and furniture, and install a 20-foot tall cat climbing-wall.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: A Backyard to Drool For
programme.desc: Antonio and team transform a health-hazard yard into a dog-friendly escape, complete with paw-operated drinking fountain and medicinal plants. Inside, a bathroom is transformed into a dog wash and a drool-proof feeding station solves a sticky problem.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Ultimate Manimal Cave
programme.desc: Antonio transforms a cluttered basement housing more than 20 rescued reptiles, mammals and birds into an underground grotto. The team build enclosures into artificial rock walls for the exotic residents and create an entertainment space everyone can use.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Fluffy Fixer Pupper
programme.desc: A family needs help creating a multi-functional space for the bunnies, ferrets, cats and dogs that have taken over their home. Antonio designs elaborate hatches, ramps and tunnels allowing the animals to be in the same room, but remain safely separated.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Dog Town, USA
programme.desc: Antonio helps a family who opened their home to neighbourhood dogs create the ultimate backyard dog park with cool, custom dog houses. It has a paddling pool for hot days and a structure of ramps and tunnels to keep everyone entertained and active.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Cat Build Gone Wild
programme.desc: A couple wants their Savannah cat and foster kittens to safely enjoy the outdoors. Antonio's solution is an intricate system of outdoor catwalks and double-decker enclosures with cat-friendly plants, natural climbing surfaces and all the toys a cat needs.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Dragons' Den
programme.desc: Antonio meets a family with two bearded dragons stuck in a tank in mom's bedroom. Antonio's solution: a backyard, temperature-controlled dragon clubhouse with separate self-sustaining tanks, a common climbing area, and a cool hangout spot for the family.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Battle Lines
programme.desc: Sig and Jake have a massive falling out, leading to new strategies and new alliances. Josh Harris returns to captain his father's boat. Sean plays dirty, but Wild Bill shows him he's messing with the wrong Captain. With big rewards, come big risks.

programme.title: Movie: Boyz 'N the Hood
programme.desc: A coming-of-age film about Tre, a bright teenager who is sent to live with his father when his mother feels he needs a male role model. Tre's father guides him to choose the smartest path when he becomes torn between gang life and attending college.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Browns
programme.desc: After years of trying to make ends meet, a single mother of three finds out that the father she's never known has passed away. She decides to go to the funeral in hopes of getting to know a part of her family she never knew existed.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: New discoveries from space give experts new clues in the hunt for Jack the Ripper. When a strange object crash-lands in Antarctica, experts speculate it could be an alien visitor.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Did We Find Flight 370?

programme.title: What on Earth?: Strange Symbols in the Desert

programme.title: What on Earth?: Cannibals in the Ghost City

programme.title: What on Earth?: Dracula's Tomb
programme.desc: Strange mounds in Transylvania might pinpoint the location of the tomb of the bloodthirsty tyrant believed to have inspired Dracula. A mysterious ancient city is discovered on a coral reef. Images of a plane crash sets off a hunt for a drug lord.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for El Dorado
programme.desc: Strange images from the jungles of Colombia could lead researchers to the legendary city of El Dorado. A bright green swirling spiral appears in the seas of the Persian Gulf. A massive complex suddenly appears secretive state of Myanmar.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Occult Temple
programme.desc: Satellites capture a temple-like, Nazi structure hidden deep in the forests of Poland, leading an expert to investigate and uncover a tale of terrifying rituals, black magic and the rise of the most feared division of Hitler's war machine.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Damned of Devil's Island
programme.desc: Mysterious satellite images lead an archaeologist to investigate a cemetery on Devil's Island, the notorious penal colony in the tropics of South America; what he finds there reveals evidence of grisly executions that fueled a shark feeding frenzy.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Americas' Lost Romans
programme.desc: The remains of an abandoned settlement high in the mountains of Peru could be an ancient Roman village, leaving experts to speculate if the Romans visited the Americas centuries before Columbus; if so, it could point to long-lost gold.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chinese Nuclear Pyramid
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of a mythical lost pyramid in China that's been hidden for centuries, and experts suspect it could be just one of many unknown structures used as a secret military base designed for subterranean nuclear warfare.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Second Chance at Death
programme.desc: While mourning the death of his wife, Julian falls hard for his much-younger coworker Teresa. For a time, her spunk lifts him out of to his sorrows until a sordid affair plunges him even deeper into the abyss.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Stolen Youth
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl seeks solace online following her parents bitter divorce, when she meets a local girl who wants to help. After an apparent runaway, Hope's family receives a call that proves Hope didn't leave by choice.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Murder Goes Live
programme.desc: When a single mother tries to move on from her open relationship, she unwittingly gets into a war of words with her boyfriend's lover. As the online insults begin to escalate, he takes matters into his own hands with devastating. consequences.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Flirting with the Enemy
programme.desc: College freshman Jason Rodriguez finds excitement in his newfound freedom online when he begins dating several girls who pique his interest. But soon after meeting one of them offline, he turns up dead and the identity of his online friends are revealed.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: No, You Don't!
programme.desc: In Florida, a woman shopping for bathing suits bravely chases after a man who harasses her and learns that he's a predator who's been preying on women for years. And then, two good samaritans intervene when an elderly couple is robbed.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Out of Control
programme.desc: A drunk passenger grabs the wheel from an Uber driver's hands, creating a potentially deadly scene on a highway. And then, a group of friends on a fishing excursion find themselves in terrifying peril when a speeding boat plows right into them.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Enough is Enough
programme.desc: A courthouse brawl after a manslaughter conviction; a woman claims Jesus is her attorney; a man becomes outraged when denied bond; a group text gone wrong; an attorney steals a wallet; a man flees an Ohio courtroom; a salad heist takes a violent turn.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What Happened to Abby?
programme.desc: A teen vanishes on her way home from school. Weeks later a puzzling letter from her arrives in the mail. This is the story of a desperate search for a girl hidden in plain sight, and her tale of bravery and resilience in the face of terror.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: No, You Don't!
programme.desc: In Florida, a woman shopping for bathing suits bravely chases after a man who harasses her and learns that he's a predator who's been preying on women for years. And then, two good samaritans intervene when an elderly couple is robbed.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Out of Control
programme.desc: A drunk passenger grabs the wheel from an Uber driver's hands, creating a potentially deadly scene on a highway. And then, a group of friends on a fishing excursion find themselves in terrifying peril when a speeding boat plows right into them.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Enough is Enough
programme.desc: A courthouse brawl after a manslaughter conviction; a woman claims Jesus is her attorney; a man becomes outraged when denied bond; a group text gone wrong; an attorney steals a wallet; a man flees an Ohio courtroom; a salad heist takes a violent turn.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Behind the Closed Door
programme.desc: In a football-crazed town, a star player and a new girl at school end up in a he-said, she-said controversy after a raucous party.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Murder Goes Live
programme.desc: When a single mother tries to move on from her open relationship, she unwittingly gets into a war of words with her boyfriend's lover. As the online insults begin to escalate, he takes matters into his own hands with devastating. consequences.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Sender: Unknown
programme.desc: 12-year-old Justin Bloxom is addicted to MySpace and attached to his cell phone. One night, Justin sneaks out of a friend's house to meet a new friend, but never returns. The investigation unravels a tangled web of fake identities and false promises.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Perfect Bride
programme.desc: 36-year old Indle King courts beautiful 18-year old Anastasia Solovieva online. She travels from her home in Kyrgyztan to Seattle to marry him, but her American dream turns into a nightmare when she realizes that Indle is not the man she thought he was.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Nail in the Coffin
programme.desc: The promise of peaceful life in Tamarac, Florida is broken when the son of a newly arrived family befriends the neighborhood's most unruly kids. Bad blood between the neighbors boils over until things come to a horrifically violent end on Halloween.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Final Notice
programme.desc: What do you do when you fear for your life and the person at the end of the 911 line is the one you need protecting from? Two Altadena families are unlucky enough to find out when an LAPD cop moves in next door.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Family Values
programme.desc: A woman who still lives in her family home befriends her new neighbours, only to be plunged into a nightmare of threats, violence and betrayal. When her brother steps up to protect her, blood will be spilled and lives forever shattered.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Games of Homes
programme.desc: New neighbours disrupt the harmony that has existed between residents for years. Alliances change and terror reigns until a winter storm puts a bloody end to the feud.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Vicious Voyeur
programme.desc: The killer of a young North Carolina woman keeps police guessing until he slips up and detectives get what they need to put him behind bars.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: End of the Line
programme.desc: When a first-year college co-ed turns up raped and murdered, it takes a freshman cop to beat the odds and catch a killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Last Dance
programme.desc: When a 16 year-old ballet dancer is assaulted and murdered in her home, Portsmouth, Virginia detectives mine dark family secrets and high school social circles to bring an obsessed killer to justice.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Nightmare Field
programme.desc: In 2011, Dalene Carlson goes missing, just weeks after relocating to Stockton, California. As investigators search for the missing 23 year-old, a shocking discovery in a nearby cornfield sets them on the trail of a vicious killer.

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When outgoing Beth Spaulding meets shy Jason Risenburg it seems that love has conquered loneliness and the two quickly marry. Illness and bad luck push their happiness to the brink, triggering a tornado of lies and deception that tears them apart.

programme.title: American Monster: Appalachian Horror Film
programme.desc: Brian and Randi Trimble are in the throes of newly married life. But when Brian meets the fun-loving Blaine Norris at work, their friendship over Blaine's low-budget horror film takes a dark turn.

programme.title: American Monster: Anything for You
programme.desc: The Snyders are thrilled when their 34-year-old son Mike finally starts a family with his sweetheart - as seen in these home videos. But after being diagnosed with a terrible illness, Mike vanishes. Only years later does his horrific fate comes to light.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs in the Past and Present
programme.desc: From the lore and history of ancient Egypt, to the myths of Native Americans, and even the art of the Renaissance period, mankind's past is riddled with the evidence of UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions could provide real evidence of the existence of UFOs. The truth about alien contact is not limited to the military, and in fact, many believe such secrets extend well into outer space, even on Mars itself.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction
programme.desc: Setting the record straight about the most familiar and beloved stories from U.S. history.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Discovering America
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the men who discovered the New World and take a trip to discover the real facts behind the most famous bridge and road in America.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Inventors
programme.desc: We don't always know the truth behind the inventors that create the devices we use every day. On America's Facts vs. Fictions, learn that Thomas Edison didn't actually invent the light bulb and Benjamin Franklin never "discovered" electricity.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Flying Machines
programme.desc: Man created flying devices in order to travel the world and fly into space. Learn about Apollo 11 and how it came home with the help of a pen and about Air Force One, which is not a machine, but a code name.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Discovering America

programme.desc: From the lore and history of ancient Egypt, to the myths of Native Americans, and even the art of the Renaissance period, mankind's past is riddled with the evidence of UFOs.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Sicilian Connection
programme.desc: Incensed by their treatment under Mussolini's regime and anxious to re-establish their European criminal network, a number of mafioso, including incarcerated kingpin Charles 'Lucky' Luciano, offered their full support to American intelligence officers.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Godfather of London
programme.desc: Billy Hill was the most powerful Kingpin in Britain's post-war underworld, but the secret behind Hill's empire is little known.

programme.title: The American Revolution: Rise of the Patriots
programme.desc: Five unsung patriots strike pivotal blows for American liberty as unrest between Britain and the colonies explodes into a war for independence.

programme.title: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back
programme.desc: Time after time, American independence seems like a lost cause as George Washington's Continental Army teeters on the brink of annihilation. The heroics of five little-known patriots help the colonies live to fight another day.

programme.title: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels
programme.desc: The American Revolution seems doomed as the British army launches a bold new campaign in the south, but five unsung patriots help reverse the course of the war and shock the world.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Blue Ridge Mountain Home
programme.desc: Mark and the guys build a massive, and very complicated, log home high in the Blue Ridge Mountains. To make this unique design work, they create an entirely new kind of notch. They work with a local team of craftsmen to pull off this high-stakes build.

programme.title: Restored: 1922 American Colonial Arts and Crafts
programme.desc: Brett takes on a bright pink arts and crafts home with American Colonial elements. He uncovers lots of hidden features while returning the house to its 1922 roots.

programme.title: Restored: 1918 Arts and Crafts Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a young family with two small children restore their home after a failed attempt to restore it themselves. The house has been in the family for generations so Brett's eye for historical accuracy is much needed.

programme.title: Restored: 1960 Post and Beam Modern
programme.desc: Preservationist Brett Waterman transforms homes with bad renovations and ugly additions.

programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: An Uphill Battle
programme.desc: Lifelong Mainers bought their Belgrade cabin in 1987 and have maintained it over the years, but the list of needed repairs continues to grow. Chase and the team give the camp much-needed life by rebuilding its front wall and replacing the heating system.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Most Unique Builds
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters unveil their top 10 'Most Unique Builds' from the show.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Saulter
programme.desc: After relocating back to Maine, a family of five has been cramped in their small cabin on a peninsula overlooking Great Pond. Chase and the team want to expand the footprint of their home, but they must work fast to finish the restoration before winter.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Trash to Treasure
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters count down their Top 10 Custom pieces of 'Trash" they've turned to "Treasure' as chosen by their fans.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin in Training
programme.desc: A couple purchased a quaint cabin with an accompanying railroad caboose. The team transform both spaces to create a camp by enlarging the main cabin with more sleeping space and indoor plumbing while the caboose provides more storage and bunk space.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Families Helping Families
programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Not a Dry Eye in the House
programme.desc: The Flood House is close to completion and the showpiece gas fireplace with a custom mantel brings one of the homeowners to tears. Over at The City Barn, more structural issues arise, creating greater challenges than Mike and the team expected.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: No Bones About It
programme.desc: Police are called to investigate after Michael makes a startling discovery at The City Barn. Then, Mike shows The Toxic Townhouse's owners the structural issues and dangerous gas line.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Mike and the team install a new furnace at The Toxic Townhouse, replacing the decade-old gas fireplace the homeowners were using to heat the home. Then, The City Barn owners are welcomed home with a reveal that takes their breath away.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Smoked and Savory
programme.desc: In Queens, New York, Michael Symon dives into the juiciest, meatiest, triple-stacked burger with beef, lamb and turkey. Some of the most authentic Mexican lamb barbacoa this side of the border is found in Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Giant Meat and Habanero Heat
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with a burger that originated as a late night, off-menu secret and accidentally became the talk of the town. Then, in Seattle, a beer hall serves a mammoth, pretzel-breaded, deep-fried pork shank.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cowboys and Cakes
programme.desc: Noah joins the crowd of the Fort Worth Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas to experience the meaty Cowboy Burrito and the Texas Juicy Lucy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Say Cheese

programme.desc: Noah Cappe visits two fall-tastic fairs for seasonal carnival treats. Fright Nights in West Palm Beach, Florida has some scarily delicious items.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: San Antonio
programme.desc: Jordan Andino is checking out the food scene after dark in San Antonio, where his first stop is The Hoppy Monk for rabbit barbacoa tacos. Then he heads to Cullum's Attagirl, an authentic chicken shack dishing out Texas-style fried chicken.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Jordan Andino starts his night in Philadelphia at the Taproom on 19th, learning the secrets behind the city's most popular wings. For dinner, he's off to Lloyd Whiskey Bar in Fishtown.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Street Eats
programme.desc: Roger Mooking searches for the best food to eat on the fly, from food trucks and roadside stands to walk-up counters and carnival fare.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hidden Treasures
programme.desc: Roger Mooking sets out on a culinary odyssey around the country for Man's Greatest Food.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Get Your Grill On
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Lockhart, Texas, to meet the team responsible for designing and crafting a monster rig that offers seven different cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ and Boils in the Bayou
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Louisiana bayou for barbecue, brunch and a crawfish boil. In Prairieville, L.A., he helps a husband-and-wife team of caterers prepare baby back ribs, brisket and 200 pounds of live crawfish.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Couples
programme.desc: From live-fire cooking to low-and-slow barbecue, Roger Mooking meets up with two couples making fiery feasts and creating sparks in California.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard BBQ Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking drops in at two backyard cookouts where the smoke is thick and the fires are hot. He helps guest chef Jeremy Conner prepare a fish roast at renowned bed and breakfast Maison Madeleine in Breaux Bridge, L.A.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lighting Up Louisiana
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Louisiana, where smoked meat makes an appearance in many classic Cajun dishes. He meets Chef Nathanial Zimet, who serves North Carolina-style smoked whole hog in po' boy sandwiches at Bourree in New Orleans.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Florida Heat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cruises the Florida coastline for two fiery cookouts that bring the heat. First, he visits Chef Marcel Vizcarra, owner of modern Peruvian eatery Llama Restaurant in St. Augustine, Fla.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Rowdy with a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Arkansas State Fair in Little Rock to discover a few brand-new favourites. In addition to the eponymous Arkanstick and rolled ice-cream treat known as the Rainbow Roll there are also deep-fried Pina Coladas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There's Something About Cherry
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in Macon, Georgia, for the International Cherry Blossom Festival and some of the prettiest, pinkest carnival treats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seoul Dip Sisters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets festive at the California Mid-Winter Fair and Fiesta! He's sampling the Seoul Dip- a Korean twist on the French Dip- then keeps things spicy with the Diablo Dog before going for a sweet finish with the Supreme Samoa doughnut stack.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Devil Wears Pasta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets things started in Florida at the Okeechobee County Fair where he samples the Hot Wing Grilled Cheese, the Sweet Bacon Devil Burger and the made-in-Florida Strawberry Margarita Funnel Cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Orange is the New Snack
programme.desc: Noah Cappe discovers brand new carnival eats in the orange groves of California at the Cloverdale Citrus Fair. The Bacon Churro Cheeseburger is a meaty mouthful sandwiched between two churros.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bite Club
programme.desc: Noah Cappe celebrates the arrival of spring in Winchester, Va., at the Shenandoah Apple Blossom Festival. He starts the day with the Cowboy Breakfast and ends it with Caramel Apple Tots.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs/ Rhapsody in Pug
programme.desc: When Bob can't finish his jigsaw puzzle without a picture of a leopard, Bingo and Rolly go searching for one. The pugs unintentionally create chaos when they go to the symphony.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Return to the Pumpkin Patch/ Haunted Howl-oween
programme.desc: After Bingo loses his collar at a pumpkin patch, he, Rolly and Hissy return to find it. When a neighborhood kid can't trick-or-treat because she's lost her costume, Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to track it down.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Bouncy Bouncy Baby/ Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Pip gets locked inside a crate with a baby kangaroo. Pip and Freddy must teach squabbling kitten and puppy siblings to share.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Knight Time/ A Bad Case of the Pricklethorns
programme.desc: When Donny's toy knight starts sticking to everything, Doc diagnoses him with Filthy-Icky-Sticky Disease and helps give him a bath. When blow-up toy Boppy springs a leak, Doc and her pals bandage him up and show him how to avoid it happening again.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Don't Rain on My Pug-rade/ Their Royal Pug-ness
programme.desc: When Bob can't leave his house to watch a parade, the pups enlist a family of ducks to march past the house. Bingo and Rolly head to England to learn how a queen is treated.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Boomerang/ Fetch That Fish
programme.desc: The pups go to Australia and get a fishy friend.

programme.title: Bluey: Hammerbarn / Feather Wand / Dance Mode
programme.desc: While on a trip to the store, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. Later, when Bingo isn't invited to Chloe's party, she uses a magic feather wand to make things incredibly heavy.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Happy Hallowocka! / The Teeth-Chattering Tale of the Haunted Pancakes
programme.desc: During Halloween, Fozzie can't help but be funny when he's supposed to be spooky! When Kermit won't try Miss Nanny's boo-berry pancakes, Summer tells a mysterious Halloween tale.

programme.title: It's Pony
programme.desc: A normal girls' life is made extraordinary by her best friend: an unpredictable, outrageous and hilarious talking pony. No matter the complications he causes, Annie knows that everything is better when Pony is around.

programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
